---
title: "HIV Testing"
description: |
  This will pull together all of the different HIV testing methods (CTR, EHE, NACHO, Lab) showing independent testing programs as well as total testing through EIP.
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)


#######################################################################################################
#########################################  EIP Database Data  #########################################
#######################################################################################################

eip <- read.csv('M:/EIP Data/EIP Database/REDCap Ver 5.0/EIP Database Data 20230608_2301.csv')
dim(eip)

# Person-level data is only visit_001_arm_1, use to match to encounters

table(eip$redcap_event_name)
person <- eip[which(eip$redcap_event_name == 'visit_001_arm_1'), ]
dim(person)

person <- select(person, record_id, mrn, dob, 
                 race___1, race___2, race___3, race___4, race___5, race___6, ethnicity,
                 sex_raised, sex_selfdefined, insurance, address_stable, address_county,
                 address_zip_code)
dim(person)

eip <- select(eip, -mrn, -dob, 
              -race___1, -race___2, -race___3, -race___4, -race___5, 
              -race___6, -ethnicity,
              -sex_raised, -sex_selfdefined, -insurance, -address_stable, -address_county,
              -address_zip_code)

# Merge person dataset with full eip dataset

dim(eip)
dim(person)
eip <- merge(eip, person, by='record_id', all.x=T)
dim(eip)
eip <- distinct(eip)
dim(eip)


# Formatting variables

summary(eip$enc_date)
eip$enc_date <- as.Date(eip$enc_date, format='%m/%d/%Y')
summary(eip$enc_date)

summary(eip$dob)
eip$dob <- as.Date(eip$dob, format='%m/%d/%Y')
summary(eip$dob)


table(eip$race___1)
White <- eip[which(eip$race___1 == '1'), ]
dim(White)
White <- select(White, record_id)
White$White <- 1
table(White$White)
White <- distinct(White)
dim(White)
head(White)

table(eip$race___2)
Black <- eip[which(eip$race___2 == '1'), ]
dim(Black)
Black <- select(Black, record_id)
Black$Black <- 1
table(Black$Black)
Black <- distinct(Black)
dim(Black)
head(Black)

table(eip$race___3)
Asian <- eip[which(eip$race___3 == '1'), ]
dim(Asian)
Asian <- select(Asian, record_id)
Asian$Asian <- 1
table(Asian$Asian)
Asian <- distinct(Asian)
dim(Asian)
head(Asian)

table(eip$race___4)
AmIn <- eip[which(eip$race___4 == '1'), ]
dim(AmIn)
AmIn <- select(AmIn, record_id)
AmIn$AmIn <- 1
table(AmIn$AmIn)
AmIn <- distinct(AmIn)
dim(AmIn)
head(AmIn)

table(eip$race___5)
RaceOther <- eip[which(eip$race___5 == '1'), ]
dim(RaceOther)
RaceOther <- select(RaceOther, record_id)
RaceOther$RaceOther <- 1
table(RaceOther$RaceOther)
RaceOther <- distinct(RaceOther)
dim(RaceOther)
head(RaceOther)

table(eip$race___6)
RaceUnk <- eip[which(eip$race___6 == '1'), ]
dim(RaceUnk)
RaceUnk <- select(RaceUnk, record_id)
RaceUnk$RaceUnk <- 1
table(RaceUnk$RaceUnk)
RaceUnk <- distinct(RaceUnk)
dim(RaceUnk)
head(RaceUnk)


race <- select(eip, record_id)
race <- distinct(race)
dim(race)


dim(race)
race <- merge(race, White, by = 'record_id', all.x = T)
race <- merge(race, Black, by = 'record_id', all.x = T)
race <- merge(race, Asian, by = 'record_id', all.x = T)
race <- merge(race, AmIn, by = 'record_id', all.x = T)
race <- merge(race, RaceOther, by = 'record_id', all.x = T)
race <- merge(race, RaceUnk, by = 'record_id', all.x = T)
dim(race)
head(race)
table(race$White)

race$White[is.na(race$White)] <- 0
race$Black[is.na(race$Black)] <- 0
race$Asian[is.na(race$Asian)] <- 0
race$AmIn[is.na(race$AmIn)] <- 0
race$RaceOther[is.na(race$RaceOther)] <- 0
race$RaceUnk[is.na(race$RaceUnk)] <- 0

race$RaceNumber <- race$White + race$Black + race$Asian + race$AmIn + race$RaceOther + race$RaceUnk
table(race$RaceNumber)
head(race)

race$race[race$RaceNumber == 1 & race$Black == '1'] <- 'Black/African American'
race$race[race$RaceNumber == 1 & race$White == '1'] <- 'White'
race$race[race$RaceNumber == 1 & race$Asian == '1'] <- 'Asian/Pacific Islander'
race$race[race$RaceNumber == 1 & race$AmIn == '1'] <- 'American Indian/Alaska native'
race$race[race$RaceNumber == 1 & race$RaceOther == '1'] <- 'Other'
race$race[race$RaceNumber > 1] <- 'Biracial/Multiracial'
race$race[race$RaceNumber == 0 | is.na(race$RaceNumber) | race$RaceUnk == '1'] <- 'Unknown'
table(race$race)

dim(eip)
dim(race)
eip <- merge(eip, race, by = 'record_id', all.x = T)
dim(eip)
table(eip$race)


table(eip$ethnicity)
eip$ethnicity[eip$ethnicity == 1] <- 'Hispanic/Latino'
eip$ethnicity[eip$ethnicity == 2] <- 'Non-Hispanic/Latino'
eip$ethnicity[is.na(eip$ethnicity)] <- 'Unknown'
table(eip$ethnicity)


table(eip$sex_raised, eip$sex_selfdefined)
eip$gender[eip$sex_raised == 1 & eip$sex_selfdefined == 1] <- 'Male'
eip$gender[eip$sex_raised == 2 & eip$sex_selfdefined == 2] <- 'Female'
eip$gender[(eip$sex_raised == 1 & eip$sex_selfdefined == 2) |
             (eip$sex_raised == 2 & eip$sex_selfdefined == 1) |
             (eip$sex_raised == 1 & eip$sex_selfdefined == 3) |
             (eip$sex_raised == 2 & eip$sex_selfdefined == 3)] <- 'Transgender/Nonbinary'
eip$gender[(eip$sex_raised == 3 & eip$sex_selfdefined == 3) |
             is.na(eip$sex_raised) | is.na(eip$sex_selfdefined)] <- 'Unknown'
table(eip$gender)


table(eip$insurance)
eip$insurance[eip$insurance == 1] <- 'None'
eip$insurance[eip$insurance == 2] <- 'UC Health (Levy)'
eip$insurance[eip$insurance == 3] <- 'Medicaid'
eip$insurance[eip$insurance == 4] <- 'Medicare'
eip$insurance[eip$insurance == 5] <- 'Military/VA'
eip$insurance[eip$insurance == 6] <- 'Private'
eip$insurance[eip$insurance == 7] <- 'Dual Medicaid/Medicare'
eip$insurance[is.na(eip$insurance)] <- 'Unknown'
table(eip$insurance)


table(eip$encounter_location)
eip$Location[eip$encounter_location == '1' | eip$encounter_location == '10'] <- 'WCH'
eip$Location[eip$encounter_location == '5' | eip$encounter_location == '8'] <- 'UCMC'
eip$Location[eip$encounter_location == '21' | eip$encounter_location == '46' |
               eip$encounter_location == '47' | eip$encounter_location == '48'] <- 'Talbert'
eip$Location[eip$encounter_location == '23' | eip$encounter_location == '40' |
               eip$encounter_location == '12' | eip$encounter_location == '10' |
               eip$encounter_location == '33' | eip$encounter_location == '8' |
               eip$encounter_location == '49' | eip$encounter_location == '50' |
               eip$encounter_location == '45' | eip$encounter_location == '7' |
               eip$encounter_location == '6' | eip$encounter_location == '9' |
               eip$encounter_location == '11' | eip$encounter_location == '13' |
               eip$encounter_location == '14' | eip$encounter_location == '15' |
               eip$encounter_location == '16' | eip$encounter_location == '17' |
               eip$encounter_location == '18' | eip$encounter_location == '19' |
               eip$encounter_location == '20' | eip$encounter_location == '22' |
               eip$encounter_location == '49' | eip$encounter_location == '24' |
               eip$encounter_location == '25' | eip$encounter_location == '26' |
               eip$encounter_location == '27' | eip$encounter_location == '28' |
               eip$encounter_location == '29' | eip$encounter_location == '30' |
               eip$encounter_location == '31' | eip$encounter_location == '32' |
               eip$encounter_location == '33'] <- 'Other'
eip$Location[eip$encounter_location == '41' | eip$encounter_location == '42' |
               eip$encounter_location == '43' | eip$encounter_location == '38' |
               eip$encounter_location == '34' | eip$encounter_location == '35' |
               eip$encounter_location == '36' | eip$encounter_location == '37'] <- 'Exchange'
eip$Location[eip$encounter_location == '44'] <- 'UC ASD'
table(eip$Location)


# Populations of Interest
### WOC, Youth (18-24), MSM, IDU, HRHS, PLWHA

table(eip$race, eip$gender)
eip$WOC[eip$race != 'White' & eip$race != 'Unknown' & eip$gender == 'Female'] <- 1
table(eip$WOC)


table(eip$age)
eip$Youth[eip$age >= 18 & eip$age <= 29] <- 1
table(eip$Youth)


eip$MSM[eip$gender == 'Male' & ((eip$sex_orientation == '2' | eip$sex_orientation == '4') |
                                  (eip$sex_w_man___1 == '1' | eip$sex_w_man___2 == '1' |
                                     eip$sex_w_man___3 == '1') |
                                  (eip$sex_w_ftm___1 == '1' | eip$sex_w_ftm___2 == '1' |
                                     eip$sex_w_ftm___3 == '1') |
                                  (eip$sex_msm___1 == '1' | eip$sex_msm___2 == '1' |
                                     eip$sex_msm___3 == '1') |
                                  (eip$hiv_dx_risks___2 == '1'))] <- 1
table(eip$MSM)


eip$IDU[eip$idu_calc == 1 | eip$hiv_dx_risks___3 == '1'] <- 1
table(eip$IDU)


# For HRHS, all sexual behavior is within the previous 12 months
### Heterosexual males that have unprotected sex with women
### Heterosexual women that have unprotected sex with men
### Heterosexual women that have sex with MSM
### Heterosexual men/women that have sex with IDU
### Heterosexual men/women that have sex with HIV+ partner
### Heterosexual men/women that exchange money/drugs for sex
### Heterosexual men/women that have sex with STD+ partner
### Heterosexual men/women that have more than 3 partners

eip$Hetero[(eip$gender == 'Male' & (eip$sex_w_woman___1 == '1' |
                                      eip$sex_w_woman___2 == '1' | eip$sex_w_woman___3 == '1')) |
             (eip$gender == 'Female' & (eip$sex_w_man___1 == '1' | eip$sex_w_man___2 == '1' |
                                          eip$sex_w_man___3 == '1'))] <- 1
table(eip$Hetero)


eip$HRHS[(eip$Hetero == 1) & ((((eip$sex_w_woman___6 == '1' | eip$sex_w_woman___7 == '1') |
                                  (is.na(eip$sex_w_woman___6) & is.na(eip$sex_w_woman___7) &
                                     is.na(eip$sex_w_woman___8)))) | (((eip$sex_w_man___6 == '1' |
                                                                          eip$sex_w_man___7 == '1') |
                                                                         (is.na(eip$sex_w_man___6) &
                                                                            is.na(eip$sex_w_man___7) &
                                                                            is.na(eip$sex_w_man___8)))) |
                                (eip$sex_msm___1 == '1' | eip$sex_msm___2 == '1' | eip$sex_msm___3 == '1') |
                                (eip$sex_idu___1 == '1' | eip$sex_idu___2 == '1' | eip$sex_idu___3 == '1') |
                                (eip$sex_hiv_pos___1 == '1' | eip$sex_hiv_pos___2 == '1' |
                                   eip$sex_hiv_pos___3 == '1') | (eip$sex_receivemoney___1 == '1' |
                                                                    eip$sex_receivemoney___2 == '1' |
                                                                    eip$sex_receivemoney___3 == '1' |
                                                                    eip$sex_receivedrugs___1 == '1' |
                                                                    eip$sex_receivedrugs___2 == '1' |
                                                                    eip$sex_receivedrugs___3 == '1' |
                                                                    eip$sex_paymoney___1 == '1' |
                                                                    eip$sex_paymoney___2 == '1' |
                                                                    eip$sex_paymoney___3 == '1' |
                                                                    eip$sex_paydrugs___1 == '1' |
                                                                    eip$sex_paydrugs___2 == '1' |
                                                                    eip$sex_paydrugs___3 == '1')  |
                                (eip$sex_sti_pos___1 == '1' | eip$sex_sti_pos___2 == '1' |
                                   eip$sex_sti_pos___3 == '1') | (eip$sex_partners_past_year >= 3))] <- 1
table(eip$HRHS)




# Appalachian

eip$appalachian_pt[eip$address_zip_code == 43006 | eip$address_zip_code == 43056 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43076 | eip$address_zip_code == 43101 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43102 | eip$address_zip_code == 43107 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43111 | eip$address_zip_code == 43115 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43127 | eip$address_zip_code == 43135 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43138 | eip$address_zip_code == 43144 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43148 | eip$address_zip_code == 43149 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43150 | eip$address_zip_code == 43152 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43155 | eip$address_zip_code == 43158 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43160 | eip$address_zip_code == 43164 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43701 | eip$address_zip_code == 43702 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43711 | eip$address_zip_code == 43713 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43716 | eip$address_zip_code == 43717 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43718 | eip$address_zip_code == 43719 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43720 | eip$address_zip_code == 43722 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43723 | eip$address_zip_code == 43724 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43725 | eip$address_zip_code == 43727 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43728 | eip$address_zip_code == 43730 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43731 | eip$address_zip_code == 43732 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43733 | eip$address_zip_code == 43734 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43735 | eip$address_zip_code == 43736 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43738 | eip$address_zip_code == 43739 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43746 | eip$address_zip_code == 43747 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43748 | eip$address_zip_code == 43749 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43750 | eip$address_zip_code == 43752 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43754 | eip$address_zip_code == 43755 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43756 | eip$address_zip_code == 43757 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43758 | eip$address_zip_code == 43759 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43760 | eip$address_zip_code == 43761 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43762 | eip$address_zip_code == 43764 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43766 | eip$address_zip_code == 43767 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43768 | eip$address_zip_code == 43771 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43772 | eip$address_zip_code == 43773 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43777 | eip$address_zip_code == 43778 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43779 | eip$address_zip_code == 43780 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43782 | eip$address_zip_code == 43783 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43786 | eip$address_zip_code == 43787 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43788 | eip$address_zip_code == 43791 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43793 | eip$address_zip_code == 43802 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43803 | eip$address_zip_code == 43804 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43805 | eip$address_zip_code == 43811 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43812 | eip$address_zip_code == 43821 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43822 | eip$address_zip_code == 43824 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43828 | eip$address_zip_code == 43830 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43832 | eip$address_zip_code == 43836 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43837 | eip$address_zip_code == 43840 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43842 | eip$address_zip_code == 43843 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43844 | eip$address_zip_code == 43845 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43901 | eip$address_zip_code == 43902 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43903 | eip$address_zip_code == 43905 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43906 | eip$address_zip_code == 43907 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43908 | eip$address_zip_code == 43909 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43910 | eip$address_zip_code == 43912 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43913 | eip$address_zip_code == 43914 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43915 | eip$address_zip_code == 43916 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43917 | eip$address_zip_code == 43920 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43925 | eip$address_zip_code == 43926 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43927 | eip$address_zip_code == 43928 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43930 | eip$address_zip_code == 43931 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43932 | eip$address_zip_code == 43933 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43934 | eip$address_zip_code == 43935 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43937 | eip$address_zip_code == 43938 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43939 | eip$address_zip_code == 43940 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43941 | eip$address_zip_code == 43942 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43943 | eip$address_zip_code == 43944 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43945 | eip$address_zip_code == 43946 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43947 | eip$address_zip_code == 43948 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43950 | eip$address_zip_code == 43951 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43952 | eip$address_zip_code == 43953 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43961 | eip$address_zip_code == 43962 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43963 | eip$address_zip_code == 43964 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43967 | eip$address_zip_code == 43968 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43970 | eip$address_zip_code == 43971 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43972 | eip$address_zip_code == 43973 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43974 | eip$address_zip_code == 43976 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43977 | eip$address_zip_code == 43981 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43983 | eip$address_zip_code == 43984 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43985 | eip$address_zip_code == 43986 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 43988 | eip$address_zip_code == 44003 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44004 | eip$address_zip_code == 44005 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44010 | eip$address_zip_code == 44030 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44032 | eip$address_zip_code == 44041 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44046 | eip$address_zip_code == 44047 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44048 | eip$address_zip_code == 44057 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44062 | eip$address_zip_code == 44064 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44068 | eip$address_zip_code == 44076 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44082 | eip$address_zip_code == 44084 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44085 | eip$address_zip_code == 44086 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44088 | eip$address_zip_code == 44093 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44099 | eip$address_zip_code == 44231 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44288 | eip$address_zip_code == 44401 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44402 | eip$address_zip_code == 44403 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44404 | eip$address_zip_code == 44405 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44406 | eip$address_zip_code == 44408 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44410 | eip$address_zip_code == 44411 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44412 | eip$address_zip_code == 44413 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44415 | eip$address_zip_code == 44416 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44417 | eip$address_zip_code == 44418 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44420 | eip$address_zip_code == 44422 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44423 | eip$address_zip_code == 44424 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44425 | eip$address_zip_code == 44427 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44428 | eip$address_zip_code == 44429 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44430 | eip$address_zip_code == 44431 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44432 | eip$address_zip_code == 44436 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44437 | eip$address_zip_code == 44438 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44439 | eip$address_zip_code == 44440 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44441 | eip$address_zip_code == 44442 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44443 | eip$address_zip_code == 44444 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44445 | eip$address_zip_code == 44446 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44449 | eip$address_zip_code == 44450 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44451 | eip$address_zip_code == 44452 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44453 | eip$address_zip_code == 44454 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44455 | eip$address_zip_code == 44460 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44470 | eip$address_zip_code == 44471 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44473 | eip$address_zip_code == 44481 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44482 | eip$address_zip_code == 44483 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44484 | eip$address_zip_code == 44485 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44486 | eip$address_zip_code == 44490 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44491 | eip$address_zip_code == 44492 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44493 | eip$address_zip_code == 44501 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44502 | eip$address_zip_code == 44503 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44504 | eip$address_zip_code == 44505 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44506 | eip$address_zip_code == 44507 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44509 | eip$address_zip_code == 44510 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44511 | eip$address_zip_code == 44512 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44513 | eip$address_zip_code == 44514 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44515 | eip$address_zip_code == 44555 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44601 | eip$address_zip_code == 44607 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44608 | eip$address_zip_code == 44609 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44610 | eip$address_zip_code == 44611 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44612 | eip$address_zip_code == 44615 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44617 | eip$address_zip_code == 44619 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44620 | eip$address_zip_code == 44621 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44622 | eip$address_zip_code == 44624 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44625 | eip$address_zip_code == 44626 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44627 | eip$address_zip_code == 44628 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44629 | eip$address_zip_code == 44633 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44634 | eip$address_zip_code == 44637 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44638 | eip$address_zip_code == 44639 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44643 | eip$address_zip_code == 44644 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44651 | eip$address_zip_code == 44653 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44654 | eip$address_zip_code == 44656 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44657 | eip$address_zip_code == 44660 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44661 | eip$address_zip_code == 44663 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44665 | eip$address_zip_code == 44671 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44672 | eip$address_zip_code == 44675 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44676 | eip$address_zip_code == 44678 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44679 | eip$address_zip_code == 44680 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44681 | eip$address_zip_code == 44682 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44683 | eip$address_zip_code == 44687 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44688 | eip$address_zip_code == 44689 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44690 | eip$address_zip_code == 44693 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44695 | eip$address_zip_code == 44697 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44699 | eip$address_zip_code == 44730 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 44842 | eip$address_zip_code == 45101 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45102 | eip$address_zip_code == 45103 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45105 | eip$address_zip_code == 45106 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45107 | eip$address_zip_code == 45112 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45115 | eip$address_zip_code == 45118 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45119 | eip$address_zip_code == 45120 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45121 | eip$address_zip_code == 45122 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45123 | eip$address_zip_code == 45130 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45131 | eip$address_zip_code == 45132 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45133 | eip$address_zip_code == 45135 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45140 | eip$address_zip_code == 45142 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45144 | eip$address_zip_code == 45147 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45148 | eip$address_zip_code == 45150 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45153 | eip$address_zip_code == 45154 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45155 | eip$address_zip_code == 45156 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45157 | eip$address_zip_code == 45158 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45159 | eip$address_zip_code == 45160 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45162 | eip$address_zip_code == 45167 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45168 | eip$address_zip_code == 45171 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45172 | eip$address_zip_code == 45176 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45244 | eip$address_zip_code == 45245 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45255 | eip$address_zip_code == 45601 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45612 | eip$address_zip_code == 45613 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45614 | eip$address_zip_code == 45616 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45617 | eip$address_zip_code == 45618 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45619 | eip$address_zip_code == 45620 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45621 | eip$address_zip_code == 45622 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45623 | eip$address_zip_code == 45624 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45628 | eip$address_zip_code == 45629 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45630 | eip$address_zip_code == 45631 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45633 | eip$address_zip_code == 45634 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45636 | eip$address_zip_code == 45638 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45640 | eip$address_zip_code == 45642 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45643 | eip$address_zip_code == 45644 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45645 | eip$address_zip_code == 45646 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45647 | eip$address_zip_code == 45648 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45650 | eip$address_zip_code == 45651 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45652 | eip$address_zip_code == 45653 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45654 | eip$address_zip_code == 45656 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45657 | eip$address_zip_code == 45658 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45659 | eip$address_zip_code == 45660 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45661 | eip$address_zip_code == 45662 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45663 | eip$address_zip_code == 45669 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45671 | eip$address_zip_code == 45672 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45673 | eip$address_zip_code == 45674 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45675 | eip$address_zip_code == 45677 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45678 | eip$address_zip_code == 45679 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45680 | eip$address_zip_code == 45681 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45682 | eip$address_zip_code == 45683 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45684 | eip$address_zip_code == 45685 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45686 | eip$address_zip_code == 45687 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45688 | eip$address_zip_code == 45690 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45692 | eip$address_zip_code == 45693 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45694 | eip$address_zip_code == 45695 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45696 | eip$address_zip_code == 45697 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45698 | eip$address_zip_code == 45699 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45701 | eip$address_zip_code == 45710 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45711 | eip$address_zip_code == 45712 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45713 | eip$address_zip_code == 45714 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45715 | eip$address_zip_code == 45716 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45717 | eip$address_zip_code == 45719 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45720 | eip$address_zip_code == 45721 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45723 | eip$address_zip_code == 45724 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45727 | eip$address_zip_code == 45729 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45732 | eip$address_zip_code == 45734 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45735 | eip$address_zip_code == 45739 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45740 | eip$address_zip_code == 45741 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45742 | eip$address_zip_code == 45743 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45744 | eip$address_zip_code == 45745 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45746 | eip$address_zip_code == 45750 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45760 | eip$address_zip_code == 45761 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45764 | eip$address_zip_code == 45766 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45767 | eip$address_zip_code == 45768 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45769 | eip$address_zip_code == 45770 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45771 | eip$address_zip_code == 45772 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45773 | eip$address_zip_code == 45775 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45776 | eip$address_zip_code == 45777 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45778 | eip$address_zip_code == 45779 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45780 | eip$address_zip_code == 45782 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45783 | eip$address_zip_code == 45784 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45786 | eip$address_zip_code == 45787 |
                     eip$address_zip_code == 45788 | eip$address_zip_code == 45789 |
                     (eip$appalachian == 1 | eip$appalachian_family == 1)] <- 1
table(eip$appalachian_pt)

```

```{r, include=FALSE}
############################################################################################
################################  Creating Patient Dataset  ################################
############################################################################################

dim(eip)
eip_pt <- select(eip, record_id, enc_date)
dim(eip_pt)
head(eip_pt)
eip_pt <- eip_pt[which(eip_pt$enc_date >= '2023-01-01' & eip_pt$enc_date <= '2023-12-31'), ]
dim(eip_pt)
eip_pt <- select(eip_pt, record_id)
head(eip_pt)
eip_pt <- distinct(eip_pt)
dim(eip_pt)
head(eip_pt)
eip_pt$unique_pt <- 1
head(eip_pt)
eip_pt <- distinct(eip_pt)


pt_age <- select(eip, record_id, dob)
dim(pt_age)
head(pt_age)
pt_age <- distinct(pt_age)
dim(pt_age)
pt_age$age <- trunc((pt_age$dob %--% '2022-01-01')/years(1))
summary(pt_age$age)
table(pt_age$age) # set 65+ to maximum age range
pt_age$age_category[pt_age$age >= 0 & pt_age$age <= 12] <- 'Under 13'
pt_age$age_category[pt_age$age >= 13 & pt_age$age <= 17] <- '13-17'
pt_age$age_category[pt_age$age >= 18 & pt_age$age <= 24] <- '18-24'
pt_age$age_category[pt_age$age >= 25 & pt_age$age <= 34] <- '25-34'
pt_age$age_category[pt_age$age >= 35 & pt_age$age <= 44] <- '35-44'
pt_age$age_category[pt_age$age >= 45 & pt_age$age <= 54] <- '45-54'
pt_age$age_category[pt_age$age >= 55 & pt_age$age <= 64] <- '55-64'
pt_age$age_category[pt_age$age >= 65 & pt_age$age <= 88] <- '65+'
table(pt_age$age_category)
pt_age <- select(pt_age, record_id, age, age_category)
dim(pt_age)
dim(eip_pt)
eip_pt <- merge(eip_pt, pt_age, by = 'record_id', all.x = T)
dim(eip_pt)
eip_pt$age[(is.na(eip_pt$age))] <- ''
head(eip_pt)
eip_pt <- distinct(eip_pt)

pt_race <- select(eip, record_id, race)
dim(pt_race)
head(pt_race)
pt_race <- distinct(pt_race)
dim(pt_race)
dim(eip_pt)
eip_pt <- merge(eip_pt, pt_race, by = 'record_id', all.x = T)
dim(eip_pt)
head(eip_pt)
eip_pt$race[(is.na(eip_pt$race))] <- ''
rm(pt_race)
eip_pt <- distinct(eip_pt)

pt_ethnicity <- select(eip, record_id, ethnicity)
dim(pt_ethnicity)
head(pt_ethnicity)
pt_ethnicity <- distinct(pt_ethnicity)
dim(pt_ethnicity)
dim(eip_pt)
eip_pt <- merge(eip_pt, pt_ethnicity, by = 'record_id', all.x = T)
dim(eip_pt)
head(eip_pt)
eip_pt$ethnicity[(is.na(eip_pt$ethnicity))] <- ''
rm(pt_ethnicity)
eip_pt <- distinct(eip_pt)

pt_gender <- select(eip, record_id, gender)
dim(pt_gender)
head(pt_gender)
pt_gender <- distinct(pt_gender)
dim(pt_gender)
dim(eip_pt)
eip_pt <- merge(eip_pt, pt_gender, by = 'record_id', all.x = T)
dim(eip_pt)
head(eip_pt)
eip_pt$gender[(is.na(eip_pt$gender))] <- ''
rm(pt_gender)
eip_pt <- distinct(eip_pt)

pt_insurance <- select(eip, record_id, insurance)
dim(pt_insurance)
head(pt_insurance)
pt_insurance <- distinct(pt_insurance)
dim(pt_insurance)
dim(eip_pt)
eip_pt <- merge(eip_pt, pt_insurance, by = 'record_id', all.x = T)
dim(eip_pt)
head(eip_pt)
eip_pt$insurance[(is.na(eip_pt$insurance))] <- ''
rm(pt_insurance)
eip_pt <- distinct(eip_pt)

pt_appalachian <- select(eip, record_id, appalachian_pt)
dim(pt_appalachian)
head(pt_appalachian)
pt_appalachian <- distinct(pt_appalachian)
dim(pt_appalachian)
dim(eip_pt)
eip_pt <- merge(eip_pt, pt_appalachian, by = 'record_id', all.x = T)
dim(eip_pt)
head(eip_pt)
eip_pt$appalachian_pt[(is.na(eip_pt$appalachian_pt))] <- ''
rm(pt_appalachian)
eip_pt <- distinct(eip_pt)

pt_location_asd <- select(eip, record_id, Location)
dim(pt_location_asd)
head(pt_location_asd)
table(pt_location_asd$Location)
pt_location_asd <- pt_location_asd[which(pt_location_asd$Location == 'UC ASD'), ]
dim(pt_location_asd)
table(pt_location_asd$Location)
pt_location_asd <- distinct(pt_location_asd)
dim(pt_location_asd)
pt_location_asd$location_asd <- 1
head(pt_location_asd)
pt_location_asd <- select(pt_location_asd, record_id, location_asd)
head(pt_location_asd)
dim(eip_pt)
eip_pt <- merge(eip_pt, pt_location_asd, by = 'record_id', all.x = T)
dim(eip_pt)
head(eip_pt)
eip_pt$location_asd[is.na(eip_pt$location_asd)] <- ''
head(eip_pt)
rm(pt_location_asd)
eip_pt <- distinct(eip_pt)

pt_location_ed_ucmc <- select(eip, record_id, Location)
dim(pt_location_ed_ucmc)
head(pt_location_ed_ucmc)
table(pt_location_ed_ucmc$Location)
pt_location_ed_ucmc <- pt_location_ed_ucmc[which(pt_location_ed_ucmc$Location == 'UCMC'), ]
dim(pt_location_ed_ucmc)
table(pt_location_ed_ucmc$Location)
pt_location_ed_ucmc <- distinct(pt_location_ed_ucmc)
dim(pt_location_ed_ucmc)
pt_location_ed_ucmc$location_ed_ucmc <- 1
head(pt_location_ed_ucmc)
pt_location_ed_ucmc <- select(pt_location_ed_ucmc, record_id, location_ed_ucmc)
head(pt_location_ed_ucmc)
dim(eip_pt)
eip_pt <- merge(eip_pt, pt_location_ed_ucmc, by = 'record_id', all.x = T)
dim(eip_pt)
head(eip_pt)
eip_pt$location_ed_ucmc[is.na(eip_pt$location_ed_ucmc)] <- ''
head(eip_pt)
rm(pt_location_ed_ucmc)
eip_pt <- distinct(eip_pt)

pt_location_ed_wch <- select(eip, record_id, Location)
dim(pt_location_ed_wch)
head(pt_location_ed_wch)
table(pt_location_ed_wch$Location)
pt_location_ed_wch <- pt_location_ed_wch[which(pt_location_ed_wch$Location == 'WCH'), ]
dim(pt_location_ed_wch)
table(pt_location_ed_wch$Location)
pt_location_ed_wch <- distinct(pt_location_ed_wch)
dim(pt_location_ed_wch)
pt_location_ed_wch$location_ed_wch <- 1
head(pt_location_ed_wch)
pt_location_ed_wch <- select(pt_location_ed_wch, record_id, location_ed_wch)
head(pt_location_ed_wch)
dim(eip_pt)
eip_pt <- merge(eip_pt, pt_location_ed_wch, by = 'record_id', all.x = T)
dim(eip_pt)
head(eip_pt)
eip_pt$location_ed_wch[is.na(eip_pt$location_ed_wch)] <- ''
head(eip_pt)
rm(pt_location_ed_wch)
eip_pt <- distinct(eip_pt)

pt_location_exch <- select(eip, record_id, Location)
dim(pt_location_exch)
head(pt_location_exch)
table(pt_location_exch$Location)
pt_location_exch <- pt_location_exch[which(pt_location_exch$Location == 'Exchange'), ]
dim(pt_location_exch)
table(pt_location_exch$Location)
pt_location_exch <- distinct(pt_location_exch)
dim(pt_location_exch)
pt_location_exch$location_exch <- 1
head(pt_location_exch)
pt_location_exch <- select(pt_location_exch, record_id, location_exch)
head(pt_location_exch)
dim(eip_pt)
eip_pt <- merge(eip_pt, pt_location_exch, by = 'record_id', all.x = T)
dim(eip_pt)
head(eip_pt)
eip_pt$location_exch[is.na(eip_pt$location_exch)] <- ''
head(eip_pt)
rm(pt_location_exch)
eip_pt <- distinct(eip_pt)

pt_location_other <- select(eip, record_id, Location)
dim(pt_location_other)
head(pt_location_other)
table(pt_location_other$Location)
pt_location_other <- pt_location_other[which(pt_location_other$Location == 'Other'), ]
dim(pt_location_other)
table(pt_location_other$Location)
pt_location_other <- distinct(pt_location_other)
dim(pt_location_other)
pt_location_other$location_other <- 1
head(pt_location_other)
pt_location_other <- select(pt_location_other, record_id, location_other)
head(pt_location_other)
dim(eip_pt)
eip_pt <- merge(eip_pt, pt_location_other, by = 'record_id', all.x = T)
dim(eip_pt)
head(eip_pt)
eip_pt$location_other[is.na(eip_pt$location_other)] <- ''
head(eip_pt)
rm(pt_location_other)
eip_pt <- distinct(eip_pt)

pt_location_talbert <- select(eip, record_id, Location)
dim(pt_location_talbert)
head(pt_location_talbert)
table(pt_location_talbert$Location)
pt_location_talbert <- pt_location_talbert[which(pt_location_talbert$Location == 'Talbert'), ]
dim(pt_location_talbert)
table(pt_location_talbert$Location)
pt_location_talbert <- distinct(pt_location_talbert)
dim(pt_location_talbert)
pt_location_talbert$location_talbert <- 1
head(pt_location_talbert)
pt_location_talbert <- select(pt_location_talbert, record_id, location_talbert)
head(pt_location_talbert)
dim(eip_pt)
eip_pt <- merge(eip_pt, pt_location_talbert, by = 'record_id', all.x = T)
dim(eip_pt)
head(eip_pt)
eip_pt$location_talbert[is.na(eip_pt$location_talbert)] <- ''
head(eip_pt)
rm(pt_location_talbert)
eip_pt <- distinct(eip_pt)

pt_msm <- select(eip, record_id, MSM)
dim(pt_msm)
head(pt_msm)
table(pt_msm$MSM)
pt_msm <- pt_msm[which(pt_msm$MSM == 1), ]
dim(pt_msm)
pt_msm <- distinct(pt_msm)
dim(pt_msm)
head(pt_msm)
dim(eip_pt)
eip_pt <- merge(eip_pt, pt_msm, by = 'record_id', all.x = T)
dim(eip_pt)
head(eip_pt)
eip_pt$MSM[is.na(eip_pt$MSM)] <- ''
head(eip_pt)
table(eip_pt$MSM)
rm(pt_msm)
eip_pt <- distinct(eip_pt)

pt_idu <- select(eip, record_id, IDU)
dim(pt_idu)
head(pt_idu)
table(pt_idu$IDU)
pt_idu <- pt_idu[which(pt_idu$IDU == 1), ]
dim(pt_idu)
pt_idu <- distinct(pt_idu)
dim(pt_idu)
head(pt_idu)
dim(eip_pt)
eip_pt <- merge(eip_pt, pt_idu, by = 'record_id', all.x = T)
dim(eip_pt)
head(eip_pt)
eip_pt$IDU[is.na(eip_pt$IDU)] <- ''
head(eip_pt)
table(eip_pt$IDU)
rm(pt_idu)
eip_pt <- distinct(eip_pt)

pt_woc <- select(eip, record_id, WOC)
dim(pt_woc)
head(pt_woc)
table(pt_woc$WOC)
pt_woc <- pt_woc[which(pt_woc$WOC == 1), ]
dim(pt_woc)
pt_woc <- distinct(pt_woc)
dim(pt_woc)
head(pt_woc)
dim(eip_pt)
eip_pt <- merge(eip_pt, pt_woc, by = 'record_id', all.x = T)
dim(eip_pt)
head(eip_pt)
eip_pt$WOC[is.na(eip_pt$WOC)] <- ''
head(eip_pt)
table(eip_pt$WOC)
rm(pt_woc)
eip_pt <- distinct(eip_pt)

pt_youth <- select(eip, record_id, Youth)
dim(pt_youth)
head(pt_youth)
table(pt_youth$Youth)
pt_youth <- pt_youth[which(pt_youth$Youth == 1), ]
dim(pt_youth)
pt_youth <- distinct(pt_youth)
dim(pt_youth)
head(pt_youth)
dim(eip_pt)
eip_pt <- merge(eip_pt, pt_youth, by = 'record_id', all.x = T)
dim(eip_pt)
head(eip_pt)
eip_pt$Youth[is.na(eip_pt$Youth)] <- ''
head(eip_pt)
table(eip_pt$Youth)
rm(pt_youth)
eip_pt <- distinct(eip_pt)

pt_hrhs <- select(eip, record_id, HRHS)
dim(pt_hrhs)
head(pt_hrhs)
table(pt_hrhs$HRHS)
pt_hrhs <- pt_hrhs[which(pt_hrhs$HRHS == 1), ]
dim(pt_hrhs)
pt_hrhs <- distinct(pt_hrhs)
dim(pt_hrhs)
head(pt_hrhs)
dim(eip_pt)
eip_pt <- merge(eip_pt, pt_hrhs, by = 'record_id', all.x = T)
dim(eip_pt)
head(eip_pt)
eip_pt$HRHS[is.na(eip_pt$HRHS)] <- ''
head(eip_pt)
table(eip_pt$HRHS)
rm(pt_hrhs)
eip_pt <- distinct(eip_pt)

pt_ht_risk <- select(eip, record_id, unsafe_work, forced_work, fear_leave_work, exchange_for_sex)
dim(pt_ht_risk)
head(pt_ht_risk)
pt_ht_risk$ht_risk[pt_ht_risk$unsafe_work == 1 |
                     pt_ht_risk$forced_work == 1 |
                     pt_ht_risk$fear_leave_work == 1 |
                     pt_ht_risk$exchange_for_sex == 1] <- 1
table(pt_ht_risk$ht_risk)
pt_ht_risk <- pt_ht_risk[which(pt_ht_risk$ht_risk == 1), ]
dim(pt_ht_risk)
pt_ht_risk <- select(pt_ht_risk, record_id, ht_risk)
pt_ht_risk <- distinct(pt_ht_risk)
dim(pt_ht_risk)
head(pt_ht_risk)
dim(eip_pt)
eip_pt <- merge(eip_pt, pt_ht_risk, by = 'record_id', all.x = T)
dim(eip_pt)
head(eip_pt)
eip_pt$ht_risk[is.na(eip_pt$ht_risk)] <- ''
head(eip_pt)
table(eip_pt$ht_risk)
rm(pt_ht_risk)
eip_pt <- distinct(eip_pt)


head(eip_pt)

```

```{r, include=FALSE}
############################################################################################
###############################  Creating Encounter Dataset  ###############################
############################################################################################


# Selecting variables needed

eip_main <- select(eip, record_id, dob, race, ethnicity, gender, age_calc, appalachian_pt, 
              enc_date, Location, offer_outcome_risks, counselor_risk_start,
              audit_c1, audit_c2, audit_c3, binge_drinking, nonmedical_drug_use,

              referral_housing_checklist___1, referral_housing_checklist___2, referral_housing_checklist___3,
              referral_personabuse_checklist___1, referral_personabuse_checklist___2, referral_personabuse_checklist___3,
              referral_general_checklist___1, referral_general_checklist___2, referral_general_checklist___3,
              referral_food_checklist___1, referral_food_checklist___2, referral_food_checklist___3,
              referral_financial_checklist___1, referral_financial_checklist___2, referral_financial_checklist___3,
              referral_other_checklist___1, referral_other_checklist___2, referral_other_checklist___3,
              prep_referral, ehe_calc)
dim(eip_main)
head(eip_main)
colnames(eip_main)[8] <- 'Date'
head(eip_main)




# Selecting data of interest
### Date range and successful encounter (date entered into Encounter Information, i.e. new visit)

eip_main <- eip_main[which(eip_main$Date >= '2023-01-01' & eip_main$Date <= '2023-12-31'), ]
dim(eip_main)
eip_main$Encounter <- 1
table(eip_main$Encounter)


# Encounter Location

table(eip_main$Location)


# Encounter Staff

table(eip_main$Encounter, eip_main$counselor_enc_start)
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zackm4cd' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 1)] <- 'Ackemyer'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zalsr7rj' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 2)] <- 'Alsheyyab'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zamed3rc' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 3)] <- 'Ameh'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zapph0eb' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 4)] <- 'Appelmann'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zbasjg3j' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 5)] <- 'Bass'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zblar1sx' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 6)] <- 'Black'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zrobbknh' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 7)] <- 'Braun'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zbren0nm' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 8)] <- 'Brempong'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zbrod1sr' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 9)] <- 'Brock'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zchaa8re' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 10)] <- 'Chaudhry'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zcorehj6' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 11)] <- 'Cornwall'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zcrul1as' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 12)] <- 'Crusey'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zdehkb5u' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 13)] <- 'Dehn'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'xdublk1u' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 14)] <- 'Duba'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zelza1nh' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 15)] <- 'Elzarka'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zfehshd8' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 50)] <- 'Fehrenbach'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zfeltx3w' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 61)] <- 'Felton'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zferac5g' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 16)] <- 'Ferreri'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zfiojmi1' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 59)] <- 'Fiorelli'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zflel3le' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 17)] <- 'Fletcher'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zfloss0a' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 53)] <- 'Floyd'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zfoskg5d' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 55)] <- 'Foss'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zfuns5yx' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 18)] <- 'Funk'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zhahb5cp' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 19)] <- 'Hahn'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zhalkwn5' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 62)] <- 'Hallinan'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zhefc5mt' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 54)] <- 'Heflin'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zhenna8y' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 20)] <- 'Henderson-Carr'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zanthznd' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 21)] <- 'Hitch'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zjahiqp2' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 22)] <- 'Israel'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zjonmbh8' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 23)] <- 'Jones'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zjusl3uh' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 24)] <- 'Justice'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zkaumf7p' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 25)] <- 'Kaufhold'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zkhaaq4l' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 64)] <- 'Khan, A'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zkhah6ua' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 26)] <- 'Khan, H'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zkomrlf0' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 27)] <- 'Kombo'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zlack4gx' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 28)] <- 'LaCalameto'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zlonmo4g' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 63)] <- 'Long'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zmasmlw8' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 29)] <- 'Massey-Besterman'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zmayme7l' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 47)] <- 'Mays'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zmccadt8' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 57)] <- 'McCann'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zmcgn4lb' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 58)] <- 'McGorry'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zmencz8s' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 49)] <- 'Mensch'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zlinmccu' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 30)] <- 'Molloy'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zpintu7v' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 31)] <- 'Pinnell'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zpipkt4z' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 32)] <- 'Piphus'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zpitm1wn' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 33)] <- 'Pitchford'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zquanlrg' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 34)] <- 'Qualkenbush-Frye'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zrehsn9g' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 35)] <- 'Rehman'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zritdfw4' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 36)] <- 'Ritchie'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zrodl6ds' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 37)] <- 'Roden'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zrodm7ej' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 56)] <- 'Rodriguez'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zryah9fi' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 38)] <- 'Ryan'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zsalh1zy' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 39)] <- 'Sall'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zscamb4w' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 51)] <- 'Scanlon'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zryahrwp' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 40)] <- 'Sickles'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zsmielf2' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 41)] <- 'Smith, E'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zsouegm7' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 42)] <- 'Southworth'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zstrcp4i' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 43)] <- 'Striker'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zswesu6r' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 44)] <- 'Sweeney'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zthoc8sk' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 45)] <- 'Thompson'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'ztwit0pz' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 52)] <- 'Twitty'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zvanph6r' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 1)] <- 'Vangani'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zvribzh9' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 48)] <- 'Vrishabhendra'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zwela5fd' | eip_main$enc_counselor == 46)] <- 'Wells'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (eip_main$enc_counselor == 99)] <- 'Other'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 &
                         (is.na(eip_main$counselor_enc_start) & is.na(eip_main$enc_counselor))] <- 'Unknown'
table(eip_main$EncounteredBy)

eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'xmerkv8r'] <- 'Meredith'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zahms8pu'] <- 'Ahmed'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zalesg5c'] <- 'Sheehan'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zandjqa8'] <- 'Andrews'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zbarle7k'] <- 'Barriger'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zbauk5ua'] <- 'Baumhardt'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zbelr7ay'] <- 'Bellary'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zcaimt8m'] <- 'Cairns'

eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zdanevhx'] <- 'Ervin'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zdavlzi4'] <- 'Davis'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zdawap5s'] <- 'Dawson'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zdenmj6a'] <- 'Dent'

eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zgepayv2'] <- 'Gepfert'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zhabcl1b'] <- 'Habetler'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zheacz5a'] <- 'Heard'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zheloqg7'] <- 'Heltman'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zhergq2p'] <- 'Herbst'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zhoro5iu'] <- 'Horrigan'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zjilcs0b'] <- 'Jilani'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zkata5bj'] <- 'Kathula'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zkindu4f'] <- 'King'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zknakn1j'] <- 'Knapp'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zkonas9u'] <- 'Kondragunta'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zlarar9o'] <- 'Larger'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zmcnjq6l'] <- 'McNulty'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zmukr1sr'] <- 'Mukherjee'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zracashk'] <- 'Ancona'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zrail4gu'] <- 'Rainey'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zreda8yb'] <- 'Reddy'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zryah9fi'] <- 'Ryan'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zschkbs4'] <- 'Schneider'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zsolsfu2'] <- 'Soliman'
eip_main$EncounteredBy[eip_main$Encounter == 1 & eip_main$counselor_enc_start == 'zwallv6q'] <- 'Walton'
table(eip_main$EncounteredBy)


# Assessment Data

table(eip_main$offer_outcome_risks)
eip_main$Assessed[eip_main$offer_outcome_risks == '1'] <- 1
table(eip_main$Assessed)
eip_main$DeclinedAssessment[eip_main$offer_outcome_risks == '0'] <- 1
table(eip_main$DeclinedAssessment)
eip_main$PreventedAssessment[eip_main$offer_outcome_risks == '2'] <- 1
table(eip_main$PreventedAssessment)

table(eip_main$Assessed, eip_main$counselor_risk_start)
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zackm4cd'] <- 'Ackemyer'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zalsr7rj'] <- 'Alsheyyab'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zamed3rc'] <- 'Ameh'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zapph0eb'] <- 'Appelmann'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zbasjg3j'] <- 'Bass'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zblar1sx'] <- 'Black'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zrobbknh'] <- 'Braun'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zbren0nm'] <- 'Brempong'

eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zfeltx3w'] <- 'Felton'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zferac5g'] <- 'Ferreri'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zfiojmi1'] <- 'Fiorelli'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zflel3le'] <- 'Fletcher'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zfloss0a'] <- 'Floyd'

eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zkhaaq4l'] <- 'Khan, A'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zkhah6ua'] <- 'Khan, H'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zkomrlf0'] <- 'Kombo'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zlack4gx'] <- 'LaCalameto'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zlonmo4g'] <- 'Long'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zmasmlw8'] <- 'Massey-Besterman'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zmayme7l'] <- 'Mays'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zmccadt8'] <- 'McCann'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zmcgn4lb'] <- 'McGorry'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zmencz8s'] <- 'Mensch'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zlinmccu'] <- 'Molloy'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zpintu7v'] <- 'Pinnell'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zpipkt4z'] <- 'Piphus'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zpitm1wn'] <- 'Pitchford'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zquanlrg'] <- 'Qualkenbush-Frye'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zrehsn9g'] <- 'Rehman'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zritdfw4'] <- 'Ritchie'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zrodl6ds'] <- 'Roden'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zrodm7ej'] <- 'Rodriguez'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zryah9fi'] <- 'Ryan'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zsalh1zy'] <- 'Sall'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zscamb4w'] <- 'Scanlon'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zryahrwp'] <- 'Sickles'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zsmielf2'] <- 'Smith, E'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zsouegm7'] <- 'Southworth'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zstrcp4i'] <- 'Striker'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zswesu6r'] <- 'Sweeney'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zthoc8sk'] <- 'Thompson'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'ztwit0pz'] <- 'Twitty'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zvanph6r'] <- 'Vangani'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zvribzh9'] <- 'Vrishabhendra'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zwela5fd'] <- 'Wells'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & is.na(eip_main$counselor_risk_start)] <- 'Unknown'
table(eip_main$AssessedBy)

eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'xmerkv8r'] <- 'Meredith'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zahms8pu'] <- 'Ahmed'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zalesg5c'] <- 'Sheehan'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zandjqa8'] <- 'Andrews'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zbarle7k'] <- 'Barriger'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zbauk5ua'] <- 'Baumhardt'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zbelr7ay'] <- 'Bellary'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zcaimt8m'] <- 'Cairns'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zcamhjn2'] <- 'Campbell'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zcanr3ad'] <- 'Canteria'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zcoxjo0b'] <- 'Cox'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zdanevhx'] <- 'Ervin'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zdavlzi4'] <- 'Davis'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zdawap5s'] <- 'Dawson'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zdenmj6a'] <- 'Dent'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zdoss8pf'] <- 'Doshi'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zdotk1rk'] <- 'Dotson'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zfrarbx0'] <- 'Francis'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zgepayv2'] <- 'Gepfert'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zhabcl1b'] <- 'Habetler'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zheacz5a'] <- 'Heard'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zheloqg7'] <- 'Heltman'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zhergq2p'] <- 'Herbst'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zhoro5iu'] <- 'Horrigan'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zjilcs0b'] <- 'Jilani'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zkata5bj'] <- 'Kathula'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zkindu4f'] <- 'King'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zknakn1j'] <- 'Knapp'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zkonas9u'] <- 'Kondragunta'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zlarar9o'] <- 'Larger'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zmcnjq6l'] <- 'McNulty'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zmukr1sr'] <- 'Mukherjee'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zracashk'] <- 'Ancona'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zrail4gu'] <- 'Rainey'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zreda8yb'] <- 'Reddy'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zryah9fi'] <- 'Ryan'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zschkbs4'] <- 'Schneider'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zsolsfu2'] <- 'Soliman'
eip_main$AssessedBy[eip_main$Assessed == 1 & eip_main$counselor_risk_start == 'zwallv6q'] <- 'Walton'
table(eip_main$AssessedBy)




eip_main$sud_assessed[eip_main$Assessed == 1 &
                        (!is.na(eip_main$audit_c1) |
                           !is.na(eip_main$audit_c2) |
                           !is.na(eip_main$audit_c3) |
                           !is.na(eip_main$binge_drinking) |
                           !is.na(eip_main$nonmedical_drug_use) |
                           !is.na(eip_main$marijuana_use) |
                           !is.na(eip_main$cocaine_use) |
                           !is.na(eip_main$rx_amphetamine_use) |
                           !is.na(eip_main$meth_use) |
                           !is.na(eip_main$inhalants_use) |
                           !is.na(eip_main$sedatives_use) |
                           !is.na(eip_main$ruffies_use) |
                           !is.na(eip_main$hallucinogen_use) |
                           !is.na(eip_main$street_opioid_use) |
                           !is.na(eip_main$rx_opioid_use) |
                           !is.na(eip_main$injection_drug_use) |
                           !is.na(eip_main$other_drug_use) |
                           !is.na(eip_main$tobacco) |
                           !is.na(eip_main$fts_knowledge) |
                           !is.na(eip_main$fts_offered))] <- 1
table(eip_main$sud_assessed)


table(eip_main$sud_screen_pos)
eip_main$SUDpositive[eip_main$sud_screen_pos == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$SUDpositive)


table(eip_main$marijuana_pos)
eip_main$Marijuana[eip_main$marijuana_pos == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$Marijuana)


table(eip_main$cocaine_pos)
eip_main$Cocaine[eip_main$cocaine_pos == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$Cocaine)


table(eip_main$rx_amphetamine_pos)
eip_main$Amphetamines[eip_main$rx_amphetamine_pos == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$Amphetamines)


table(eip_main$meth_pos)
eip_main$Methamphetamines[eip_main$meth_pos == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$Methamphetamines)


table(eip_main$inhalants_pos)
eip_main$Inhalants[eip_main$inhalants_pos == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$Inhalants)


table(eip_main$sedatives_pos)
eip_main$Sedatives[eip_main$sedatives_pos == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$Sedatives)


table(eip_main$hallucinogen_pos)
eip_main$Hallucinogens[eip_main$hallucinogen_pos == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$Hallucinogens)


table(eip_main$street_opioid_pos)
eip_main$StreetOpioids[eip_main$street_opioid_pos == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$StreetOpioids)


table(eip_main$rx_opioid_pos)
eip_main$PrescriptionOpioids[eip_main$rx_opioid_pos == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$PrescriptionOpioids)


eip_main$Opioids[eip_main$street_opioid_pos == 1 | eip_main$rx_opioid_pos == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$Opioids)


# MH assessments are counted as those that are SUD+
## this is due to branching logic of GAD/PHQ/PCL-C only for those SUD+
## count those with preliminary screen of GAD2/PHQ2 and positivity for comparison
eip_main$mh_assessed[eip_main$Assessed == 1 &
                       (eip_main$sud_screen_positive == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$mh_assessed)


table(eip_main$mh_screen_positive)
eip_main$MHpositive[eip_main$mh_screen_positive == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$MHpositive)


table(eip_main$phq9_score_positive)
eip_main$Depression[eip_main$phq9_score_positive == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$Depression)


table(eip_main$gad7_score_positive)
eip_main$Anxiety[eip_main$gad7_score_positive == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$Anxiety)


table(eip_main$pclc_score_positive)
eip_main$PTSD[eip_main$pclc_score_positive == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$PTSD)


eip_main$mh_assessed_prelim[eip_main$phq1 == 0 | eip_main$phq1 == 1 | eip_main$phq1 == 2 |
                              eip_main$phq1 == 3 | eip_main$phq2 == 0 | eip_main$phq2 == 1 |
                              eip_main$phq2 == 2 | eip_main$phq2 == 3 | eip_main$gad1 == 0 |
                              eip_main$gad1 == 1 | eip_main$gad1 == 2 | eip_main$gad1 == 3 |
                              eip_main$gad2 == 0 | eip_main$gad2 == 1 | eip_main$gad2 == 2 |
                              eip_main$gad2 == 3] <- 1
table(eip_main$mh_assessed_prelim)


eip_main$mh_screen_positive_prelim[eip_main$phq2_score >= 3 | eip_main$gad2_score >= 3] <- 1
table(eip_main$mh_screen_positive_prelim)


eip_main$Depression_prelim[eip_main$phq2_score >= 3] <- 1
table(eip_main$Depression_prelim)


eip_main$Anxiety_prelim[eip_main$gad2_score >= 3] <- 1
table(eip_main$Anxiety_prelim)


eip_main$Depression_Anxiety_prelim[eip_main$phq2_score >= 3 & eip_main$gad2_score >= 3] <- 1
table(eip_main$Depression_Anxiety_prelim)




# PrEP Eligibility and Assessment


eip_main$prep_eligible_assessed[eip_main$Assessed == 1 &
                                  ((eip_main$sex_receivemoney___0 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receivemoney___0)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_receivemoney___1 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receivemoney___1)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_receivemoney___2 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receivemoney___2)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_receivemoney___3 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receivemoney___3)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_receivemoney___4 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receivemoney___4)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_receivemoney___5 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receivemoney___5)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_receivemoney___6 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receivemoney___6)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_receivemoney___7 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receivemoney___7)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_receivemoney___8 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receivemoney___8)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___0 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___0)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___1 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___1)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___2 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___2)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___3 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___3)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___4 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___4)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___5 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___5)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___6 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___6)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___7 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___7)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___8 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___8)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_partners_past_year != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_partners_past_year)) |
                                     (eip_main$share_works_last != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$share_works_last)) |
                                     (eip_main$prior_std != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$prior_std)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_w_man___0 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_w_man___0)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_w_man___1 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_w_man___1)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_w_man___2 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_w_man___2)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_w_man___3 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_w_man___3)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_w_man___4 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_w_man___4)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_w_man___5 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_w_man___5)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_w_man___6 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_w_man___6)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_w_man___7 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_w_man___7)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_w_man___8 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_w_man___8)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_give_anal___0 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_give_anal___0)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_give_anal___1 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_give_anal___1)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_give_anal___2 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_give_anal___2)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_give_anal___3 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_give_anal___3)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_give_anal___4 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_give_anal___4)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_give_anal___5 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_give_anal___5)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_give_anal___6 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_give_anal___6)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_give_anal___7 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_give_anal___7)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_give_anal___8 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_give_anal___8)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_receive_anal___0 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receive_anal___0)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_receive_anal___1 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receive_anal___1)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_receive_anal___2 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receive_anal___2)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_receive_anal___3 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receive_anal___3)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_receive_anal___4 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receive_anal___4)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_receive_anal___5 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receive_anal___5)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_receive_anal___6 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receive_anal___6)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_receive_anal___7 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receive_anal___7)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_receive_anal___8 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_receive_anal___8)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_vaginal___0 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_vaginal___0)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_vaginal___1 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_vaginal___1)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_vaginal___2 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_vaginal___2)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_vaginal___3 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_vaginal___3)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_vaginal___4 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_vaginal___4)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_vaginal___5 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_vaginal___5)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_vaginal___6 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_vaginal___6)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_vaginal___7 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_vaginal___7)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_vaginal___8 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_vaginal___8)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_msm___0 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_msm___0)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_msm___1 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_msm___1)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_msm___2 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_msm___2)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_msm___3 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_msm___3)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_msm___4 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_msm___4)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_msm___5 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_msm___5)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_msm___6 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_msm___6)) |
```
