                                     (eip_main$sex_msm___7 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_msm___7)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_msm___8 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_msm___8)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_idu___0 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_idu___0)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_idu___1 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_idu___1)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_idu___2 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_idu___2)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_idu___3 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_idu___3)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_idu___4 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_idu___4)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_idu___5 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_idu___5)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_idu___6 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_idu___6)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_idu___7 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_idu___7)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_idu___8 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_idu___8)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_hiv_pos___0 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_hiv_pos___0)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_hiv_pos___1 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_hiv_pos___1)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_hiv_pos___2 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_hiv_pos___2)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_hiv_pos___3 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_hiv_pos___3)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_hiv_pos___4 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_hiv_pos___4)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_hiv_pos___5 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_hiv_pos___5)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_hiv_pos___6 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_hiv_pos___6)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_hiv_pos___7 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_hiv_pos___7)) |
                                     (eip_main$sex_hiv_pos___8 != 0 & !is.na(eip_main$sex_hiv_pos___8)))] <- 1
table(eip_main$prep_eligible_assessed)


table(eip_main$prep_eligible)
eip_main$PrEPeligible[eip_main$prep_eligible == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$PrEPeligible)


eip_main$prep_assessed[eip_main$PrEPeligible == 1 &
                         (!is.na(eip_main$prep_knowledge) |
                            !is.na(eip_main$prep_current_use) |
                            !is.na(eip_main$prep_past_yr) |
                            !is.na(eip_main$pep_knowledge) |
                            !is.na(eip_main$pep_current_use) |
                            !is.na(eip_main$pep_past_yr) |
                            !is.na(eip_main$daily_med))] <- 1
table(eip_main$prep_assessed)


table(eip_main$prep_eligible_sex_work)
eip_main$SexWork[eip_main$prep_eligible_sex_work == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$SexWork)


table(eip_main$prep_eligible_multi_prtnrs)
eip_main$MultiPartners[eip_main$prep_eligible_multi_prtnrs == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$MultiPartners)


table(eip_main$prep_eligible_pwid)
eip_main$PWID[eip_main$prep_eligible_pwid == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$PWID)


table(eip_main$prep_eligible_sti_past_yr)
eip_main$STIpastyr[eip_main$prep_eligible_sti_past_yr == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$STIpastyr)


table(eip_main$prep_eligible_msm)
eip_main$MSM[eip_main$prep_eligible_msm == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$MSM)


table(eip_main$prep_eligible_hrh)
eip_main$HRHS[eip_main$prep_eligible_hrh == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$HRHS)




# Peer Encounters

table(eip_main$peer_navigator)
eip_main$peer_encounters[eip_main$peer_navigator == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$peer_encounters)




# HIV Test Data

table(eip_main$offer_outcome_hiv)
table(eip_main$offer_outcome_hiv_2)
table(eip_main$offer_outcome_hiv_3)
eip_main$HIVtest[eip_main$offer_outcome_hiv == '1' | eip_main$offer_outcome_hiv_2 == '1' | eip_main$offer_outcome_hiv_3 == '1'] <- 1
table(eip_main$HIVtest)


eip_main$DeclineHIVtest[is.na(eip_main$HIVtest) & (eip_main$offer_outcome_hiv == '0' | eip_main$offer_outcome_hiv_2 == '0' |
                        eip_main$offer_outcome_hiv_3 == '0')] <- 1
table(eip_main$DeclineHIVtest)

eip_main$PreventHIVtest[is.na(eip_main$HIVtest) & (eip_main$offer_outcome_hiv == '2' | eip_main$offer_outcome_hiv_2 == '2' |
                      eip_main$offer_outcome_hiv_3 == '2')] <- 1
table(eip_main$PreventHIVtest)


table(eip_main$HIVtest, eip_main$counselor_hiv_start)
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zackm4cd'] <- 'Ackemyer'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zalsr7rj'] <- 'Alsheyyab'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zamed3rc'] <- 'Ameh'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zapph0eb'] <- 'Appelmann'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zbasjg3j'] <- 'Bass'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zblar1sx'] <- 'Black'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zrobbknh'] <- 'Braun'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zbren0nm'] <- 'Brempong'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zbrod1sr'] <- 'Brock'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zchaa8re'] <- 'Chaudhry'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zcorehj6'] <- 'Cornwall'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zcrul1as'] <- 'Crusey'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zdehkb5u'] <- 'Dehn'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'xdublk1u'] <- 'Duba'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zelza1nh'] <- 'Elzarka'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zfehshd8'] <- 'Fehrenbach'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zfeltx3w'] <- 'Felton'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zferac5g'] <- 'Ferreri'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zfiojmi1'] <- 'Fiorelli'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zflel3le'] <- 'Fletcher'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zfloss0a'] <- 'Floyd'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zfoskg5d'] <- 'Foss'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zfuns5yx'] <- 'Funk'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zhahb5cp'] <- 'Hahn'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zhalkwn5'] <- 'Hallinan'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zhefc5mt'] <- 'Heflin'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zhenna8y'] <- 'Henderson-Carr'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zanthznd'] <- 'Hitch'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zjahiqp2'] <- 'Israel'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zjonmbh8'] <- 'Jones'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zjusl3uh'] <- 'Justice'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zkaumf7p'] <- 'Kaufhold'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zkhaaq4l'] <- 'Khan, A'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zkhah6ua'] <- 'Khan, H'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zkomrlf0'] <- 'Kombo'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zlack4gx'] <- 'LaCalameto'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zlonmo4g'] <- 'Long'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zmasmlw8'] <- 'Massey-Besterman'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zmayme7l'] <- 'Mays'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zmccadt8'] <- 'McCann'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zmcgn4lb'] <- 'McGorry'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zmencz8s'] <- 'Mensch'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zlinmccu'] <- 'Molloy'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zpintu7v'] <- 'Pinnell'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zpipkt4z'] <- 'Piphus'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zpitm1wn'] <- 'Pitchford'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zquanlrg'] <- 'Qualkenbush-Frye'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zrehsn9g'] <- 'Rehman'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zritdfw4'] <- 'Ritchie'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zrodl6ds'] <- 'Roden'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zrodm7ej'] <- 'Rodriguez'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zryah9fi'] <- 'Ryan'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zsalh1zy'] <- 'Sall'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zscamb4w'] <- 'Scanlon'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zryahrwp'] <- 'Sickles'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zsmielf2'] <- 'Smith, E'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zsouegm7'] <- 'Southworth'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zstrcp4i'] <- 'Striker'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zswesu6r'] <- 'Sweeney'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zthoc8sk'] <- 'Thompson'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'ztwit0pz'] <- 'Twitty'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zvanph6r'] <- 'Vangani'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zvribzh9'] <- 'Vrishabhendra'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zwela5fd'] <- 'Wells'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & is.na(eip_main$counselor_hiv_start)] <- 'Unknown'
table(eip_main$TestedBy)

eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'xmerkv8r'] <- 'Meredith'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zahms8pu'] <- 'Ahmed'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zalesg5c'] <- 'Sheehan'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zandjqa8'] <- 'Andrews'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zbarle7k'] <- 'Barriger'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zbauk5ua'] <- 'Baumhardt'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zbelr7ay'] <- 'Bellary'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zcaimt8m'] <- 'Cairns'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zcamhjn2'] <- 'Campbell'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zcanr3ad'] <- 'Canteria'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zcoxjo0b'] <- 'Cox'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zdanevhx'] <- 'Ervin'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zdavlzi4'] <- 'Davis'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zdawap5s'] <- 'Dawson'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zdenmj6a'] <- 'Dent'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zdoss8pf'] <- 'Doshi'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zdotk1rk'] <- 'Dotson'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zfrarbx0'] <- 'Francis'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zgepayv2'] <- 'Gepfert'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zhabcl1b'] <- 'Habetler'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zheacz5a'] <- 'Heard'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zheloqg7'] <- 'Heltman'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zhergq2p'] <- 'Herbst'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zhoro5iu'] <- 'Horrigan'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zjilcs0b'] <- 'Jilani'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zkata5bj'] <- 'Kathula'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zkindu4f'] <- 'King'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zknakn1j'] <- 'Knapp'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zkonas9u'] <- 'Kondragunta'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zlarar9o'] <- 'Larger'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zmcnjq6l'] <- 'McNulty'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zmukr1sr'] <- 'Mukherjee'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zracashk'] <- 'Ancona'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zrail4gu'] <- 'Rainey'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zreda8yb'] <- 'Reddy'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zryah9fi'] <- 'Ryan'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zschkbs4'] <- 'Schneider'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zsolsfu2'] <- 'Soliman'
eip_main$TestedBy[eip_main$HIVtest == 1 & eip_main$counselor_hiv_start == 'zwallv6q'] <- 'Walton'
table(eip_main$TestedBy)


table(eip_main$ctr_calc)
table(eip_main$ehe_calc)

eip_main$EHEtest[eip_main$ehe_calc == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$EHEtest)

eip_main$CTRtest[eip_main$ctr_calc == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$CTRtest)


table(eip_main$final_test_status_hiv)
eip_main$HIVtestresult[eip_main$final_test_status_hiv == '0'] <- 0
eip_main$HIVtestresult[eip_main$final_test_status_hiv == '1'] <- 1
# 2 = Indeterminate and 3 = Needs Confirmatory Test, assume Reactive and unconfirmed
eip_main$HIVtestresult[eip_main$final_test_status_hiv == '3' | eip_main$final_test_status_hiv == '2'] <- 1
table(eip_main$HIVtestresult)


table(eip_main$CTRtest, eip_main$HIVtestresult)
eip_main$CTRtestpos[eip_main$CTRtest == 1 & eip_main$HIVtestresult == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$CTRtestpos)


table(eip_main$EHEtest, eip_main$HIVtestresult)
eip_main$EHEtestpos[eip_main$EHEtest == 1 & eip_main$HIVtestresult == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$EHEtestpos)


table(eip_main$acute_hiv)
eip_main$AcuteHIV[eip_main$acute_hiv == '1'] <- 1
table(eip_main$AcuteHIV)


# Indeterminate results

eip_main$incomplete_hiv_result[eip_main$final_test_status_hiv == 2 |
                                 eip_main$final_test_status_hiv == 3] <- 1
table(eip_main$incomplete_hiv_result)


# False positives

eip_main$false_positive[(eip_main$hiv_result1 == 1 | eip_main$hiv_result1 == 2 |
                           eip_main$hiv_result2 == 1 | eip_main$hiv_result2 == 2 |
                           eip_main$hiv_result3 == 1 | eip_main$hiv_result3 == 2 |
                           eip_main$hiv_result4 == 1 | eip_main$hiv_result4 == 2 |
                           eip_main$hiv_result5 == 1 | eip_main$hiv_result5 == 2 |
                           eip_main$hiv_result6 == 1 | eip_main$hiv_result6 == 2) &
                          eip_main$final_test_status_hiv == 0] <- 1
table(eip_main$false_positive)


# HIV Status

table(eip_main$ltc_services___1, eip_main$diagnosis_hiv)
eip_main$HIVstatus[eip_main$ltc_services___1 == '1' & eip_main$diagnosis_hiv == '1'] <- 'New HIV Diagnosis'
eip_main$HIVstatus[eip_main$ltc_services___1 == '1' & eip_main$diagnosis_hiv == '2'] <- 'Previous HIV Diagnosis'
eip_main$HIVstatus[eip_main$ltc_services___1 == '1' & eip_main$diagnosis_hiv == '3'] <- 'Unknown HIV Status'
table(eip_main$HIVstatus)


table(eip_main$CTRtestpos, eip_main$HIVstatus)
eip_main$NewCTRpos[eip_main$CTRtestpos == 1 & eip_main$HIVstatus == 'New HIV Diagnosis'] <- 1
table(eip_main$NewCTRpos)


table(eip_main$EHEtestpos, eip_main$HIVstatus)
eip_main$NewEHEpos[eip_main$EHEtestpos == 1 & eip_main$HIVstatus == 'New HIV Diagnosis'] <- 1
table(eip_main$NewEHEpos)



# PLWHA

eip_main$PLWHA[(eip_main$history_hiv_test_result == '1' | eip_main$final_test_status_hiv == '1' |
             eip_main$diagnosis_hiv == '1' | eip_main$diagnosis_hiv == '2')] <- 1
table(eip_main$PLWHA)


# PLWHA Assessed
## additionally add variables from HIV LTC form for assessed definition

table(eip_main$Assessed, eip_main$PLWHA)
eip_main$PLWHA_ltc_assessed[eip_main$ses_help_seeking_2 == 0 | eip_main$ses_help_seeking_2 == 1 |
                              eip_main$ses_dependents == 0 | eip_main$ses_dependents == 1 |
                              eip_main$ses_case_manager == 0 | eip_main$ses_case_manager == 1 |
                              eip_main$ses_counseling_dx == 0 | eip_main$ses_counseling_dx == 1 |
                              eip_main$ses_counseling_drug == 0 | eip_main$ses_counseling_drug == 1 |
                              eip_main$ses_support_group == 0 | eip_main$ses_support_group == 1 |
                              eip_main$last_see_hiv_physician == 0 |
                              eip_main$last_see_hiv_physician == 1 |
                              eip_main$last_see_hiv_physician == 2 |
                              eip_main$last_see_hiv_physician == 3 |
                              eip_main$last_see_hiv_physician == 4 |
                              eip_main$current_hiv_script == 0 |
                              eip_main$current_hiv_script == 1 |
                              eip_main$current_hiv_script == 2 |
                              eip_main$current_hiv_script == 3 |
                              eip_main$current_hiv_script == 4 |
                              eip_main$current_hiv_script == 5 |
                              eip_main$current_hiv_script == 6] <- 1
table(eip_main$PLWHA_ltc_assessed)
eip_main$PLWHAassessed[(eip_main$Assessed == 1 | eip_main$PLWHA_ltc_assessed) & eip_main$PLWHA == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$PLWHAassessed)


# PLWHA engaged in care (80% goal)
### only count New and Previous, since Unknown statuses should be known if properly linked

table(eip_main$HIVstatus, eip_main$ltc_hiv_final_ltc_status)
eip_main$HIVlinked[(eip_main$HIVstatus == 'New HIV Diagnosis' | eip_main$HIVstatus == 'Previous HIV Diagnosis') &
                eip_main$ltc_hiv_final_ltc_status == '1'] <- 1
table(eip_main$HIVlinked)
# create variable for eligible to be linked


# Populations of Interest
### WOC, Youth (18-24), MSM, IDU, HRHS

table(eip_main$race, eip_main$gender)
eip_main$WOC[eip_main$race != 'White' & eip_main$race != 'Unknown' & eip_main$gender == 'Female'] <- 1
table(eip_main$WOC)

table(eip_main$PLWHA, eip_main$WOC)
eip_main$PLWHA_WOCassessed[eip_main$PLWHA == 1 & eip_main$WOC == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$PLWHA_WOCassessed)


table(eip_main$age)
eip_main$Youth[eip_main$age_calc >= 18 & eip_main$age_calc <= 29] <- 1
table(eip_main$Youth)

table(eip_main$PLWHA, eip_main$Youth)
eip_main$PLWHA_Youthassessed[eip_main$PLWHA == 1 & eip_main$Youth == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$PLWHA_Youthassessed)


eip_main$MSM[eip_main$gender == 'Male' & ((eip_main$sex_orientation == '2' | eip_main$sex_orientation == '4') |
                                        (eip_main$sex_w_man___1 == '1' | eip_main$sex_w_man___2 == '1' |
                                           eip_main$sex_w_man___3 == '1') |
                                        (eip_main$sex_w_ftm___1 == '1' | eip_main$sex_w_ftm___2 == '1' |
                                           eip_main$sex_w_ftm___3 == '1') |
                                        (eip_main$sex_msm___1 == '1' | eip_main$sex_msm___2 == '1' |
                                           eip_main$sex_msm___3 == '1') |
                                        (eip_main$hiv_dx_risks___2 == '1'))] <- 1
table(eip_main$MSM)


eip_main$IDU[eip_main$idu_calc == 1 | eip_main$hiv_dx_risks___3 == '1'] <- 1
table(eip_main$IDU)

table(eip_main$PLWHA, eip_main$IDU)
eip_main$PLWHA_IDUassessed[eip_main$PLWHA == 1 & eip_main$IDU == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$PLWHA_IDUassessed)


# For HRHS, all sexual behavior is within the previous 12 months
### Heterosexual males that have unprotected sex with women
### Heterosexual women that have unprotected sex with men
### Heterosexual women that have sex with MSM
### Heterosexual men/women that have sex with IDU
### Heterosexual men/women that have sex with HIV+ partner
### Heterosexual men/women that exchange money/drugs for sex
### Heterosexual men/women that have sex with STD+ partner
### Heterosexual men/women that have more than 3 partners

eip_main$Hetero[(eip_main$gender == 'Male' & (eip_main$sex_w_woman___1 == '1' |
                                            eip_main$sex_w_woman___2 == '1' | eip_main$sex_w_woman___3 == '1')) |
             (eip_main$gender == 'Female' & (eip_main$sex_w_man___1 == '1' | eip_main$sex_w_man___2 == '1' |
                                              eip_main$sex_w_man___3 == '1'))] <- 1
table(eip_main$Hetero)


eip_main$HRHS[(eip_main$Hetero == 1) & ((((eip_main$sex_w_woman___6 == '1' | eip_main$sex_w_woman___7 == '1') |
                                  (is.na(eip_main$sex_w_woman___6) & is.na(eip_main$sex_w_woman___7) &
                                     is.na(eip_main$sex_w_woman___8)))) | (((eip_main$sex_w_man___6 == '1' |
                                                                          eip_main$sex_w_man___7 == '1') |
                                                                         (is.na(eip_main$sex_w_man___6) &
                                                                            is.na(eip_main$sex_w_man___7) &
                                                                            is.na(eip_main$sex_w_man___8)))) |
                                (eip_main$sex_msm___1 == '1' | eip_main$sex_msm___2 == '1' | eip_main$sex_msm___3 == '1') |
                                (eip_main$sex_idu___1 == '1' | eip_main$sex_idu___2 == '1' | eip_main$sex_idu___3 == '1') |
                                (eip_main$sex_hiv_pos___1 == '1' | eip_main$sex_hiv_pos___2 == '1' |
                                   eip_main$sex_hiv_pos___3 == '1') | (eip_main$sex_receivemoney___1 == '1' |
                                                                    eip_main$sex_receivemoney___2 == '1' |
                                                                    eip_main$sex_receivemoney___3 == '1' |
                                                                    eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___1 == '1' |
                                                                    eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___2 == '1' |
                                                                    eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___3 == '1' |
                                                                    eip_main$sex_paymoney___1 == '1' |
                                                                    eip_main$sex_paymoney___2 == '1' |
                                                                    eip_main$sex_paymoney___3 == '1' |
                                                                    eip_main$sex_paydrugs___1 == '1' |
                                                                    eip_main$sex_paydrugs___2 == '1' |
                                                                    eip_main$sex_paydrugs___3 == '1')  |
                                (eip_main$sex_sti_pos___1 == '1' | eip_main$sex_sti_pos___2 == '1' |
                                   eip_main$sex_sti_pos___3 == '1') | (eip_main$sex_partners_past_year >= 3))] <- 1
table(eip_main$HRHS)


table(eip_main$MSM, eip_main$IDU, eip_main$CTRtest)
eip_main$MSM_IDU_CTRtested[eip_main$MSM == 1 & eip_main$IDU == 1 & eip_main$CTRtest == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$MSM_IDU_CTRtested)


table(eip_main$MSM, eip_main$IDU, eip_main$EHEtest)
eip_main$MSM_IDU_EHEtested[eip_main$MSM == 1 & eip_main$IDU == 1 & eip_main$EHEtest == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$MSM_IDU_EHEtested)


table(eip_main$MSM, eip_main$Youth, eip_main$CTRtest)
eip_main$MSM_Youth_CTRtested[eip_main$MSM == 1 & eip_main$Youth == 1 & eip_main$CTRtest == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$MSM_Youth_CTRtested)


table(eip_main$MSM, eip_main$Youth, eip_main$EHEtest)
eip_main$MSM_Youth_EHEtested[eip_main$MSM == 1 & eip_main$Youth == 1 & eip_main$EHEtest == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$MSM_Youth_EHEtested)


table(eip_main$MSM, eip_main$CTRtest, eip_main$HIVtestresult)
eip_main$MSM_NewCTR_HIV_Dx[eip_main$CTRtest == 1 & eip_main$MSM == 1 & eip_main$HIVtestresult == 1 &
                             eip_main$HIVstatus == 'New HIV Diagnosis'] <- 1
table(eip_main$MSM_NewCTR_HIV_Dx)


table(eip_main$MSM, eip_main$Assessed)
eip_main$MSM_CTRassessed[eip_main$MSM == 1 & eip_main$Assessed == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$MSM_CTRassessed)


table(eip_main$EHEtest, eip_main$MSM, eip_main$Assessed)
eip_main$MSM_EHEassessed[eip_main$MSM == 1 & eip_main$Assessed == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$MSM_EHEassessed)


table(eip_main$MSM, eip_main$CTRtest)
eip_main$MSM_CTRtested[eip_main$MSM == 1 & eip_main$CTRtest == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$MSM_CTRtested)


table(eip_main$MSM, eip_main$EHEtest)
eip_main$MSM_EHEtested[eip_main$MSM == 1 & eip_main$EHEtest == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$MSM_EHEtested)


table(eip_main$HRHS, eip_main$IDU, eip_main$CTRtest)
eip_main$HRHS_IDU_CTRtested[eip_main$HRHS == 1 & eip_main$IDU == 1 & eip_main$CTRtest == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$HRHS_IDU_CTRtested)


table(eip_main$HRHS, eip_main$Youth, eip_main$CTRtest)
eip_main$HRHS_Youth_CTRtested[eip_main$HRHS == 1 & eip_main$Youth == 1 & eip_main$CTRtest == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$HRHS_Youth_CTRtested)


table(eip_main$HRHS, eip_main$WOC, eip_main$CTRtest)
eip_main$HRHS_WOC_CTRtested[eip_main$HRHS == 1 & eip_main$WOC == 1 & eip_main$CTRtest == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$HRHS_WOC_CTRtested)


table(eip_main$HRHS, eip_main$CTRtest, eip_main$HIVtestresult)
eip_main$HRHS_NewCTR_HIV_Dx[eip_main$CTRtest == 1 & eip_main$HRHS == 1 & eip_main$HIVtestresult == 1 &
                              eip_main$HIVstatus == 'New HIV Diagnosis'] <- 1
table(eip_main$HRHS_NewCTR_HIV_Dx)


table(eip_main$HRHS, eip_main$Assessed)
eip_main$HRHS_CTRassessed[eip_main$HRHS == 1 & eip_main$Assessed == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$HRHS_CTRassessed)


table(eip_main$HRHS, eip_main$Assessed)
eip_main$HRHS_EHEassessed[eip_main$HRHS == 1 & eip_main$Assessed == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$HRHS_EHEassessed)


table(eip_main$HRHS, eip_main$CTRtest)
eip_main$HRHS_CTRtested[eip_main$HRHS == 1 & eip_main$CTRtest == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$HRHS_CTRtested)


table(eip_main$HRHS, eip_main$EHEtest)
eip_main$HRHS_EHEtested[eip_main$HRHS == 1 & eip_main$EHEtest == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$HRHS_EHEtested)


# FTS Data

eip_main$fts_offered_link[eip_main$ltc_sud_fentanyl_strips == 1 |
                               eip_main$ltc_sud_fentanyl_strips == 2] <- 1
table(eip_main$fts_offered_link)


eip_main$fts_accepted_link[eip_main$ltc_sud_fentanyl_strips == 2] <- 1
table(eip_main$fts_accepted_link)


eip_main$fts_offered_assess[eip_main$fts_offered == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$fts_offered_assess)


eip_main$fts_accepted_assess[eip_main$fts_provided == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$fts_accepted_assess)


# QRT Data

eip_main$qrt_approached[eip_main$ltc_sud_qrt_referral == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$qrt_approached)


eip_main$qrt_consent[eip_main$ltc_sud_qrt_offer_outcome == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$qrt_consent)


eip_main$qrt_declined[eip_main$ltc_sud_qrt_offer_outcome == 0] <- 1
table(eip_main$qrt_declined)


eip_main$qrt_prevented[eip_main$ltc_sud_qrt_offer_outcome == 2] <- 1
table(eip_main$qrt_prevented)




# HT Assessment Data

eip_main$ht_assessed[(eip_main$unsafe_work == 0 | eip_main$unsafe_work == 1 | eip_main$unsafe_work == 3) |
                       (eip_main$forced_work == 0 | eip_main$forced_work == 1 | eip_main$forced_work == 3) |
                       (eip_main$fear_leave_work == 0 | eip_main$fear_leave_work == 1 | eip_main$fear_leave_work == 3) |
                       (eip_main$exchange_for_sex == 0 | eip_main$exchange_for_sex == 1 | eip_main$exchange_for_sex == 3) |
                       (eip_main$sex_receivemoney___0 == 1 |
                          eip_main$sex_receivemoney___1 == 1 |
                          eip_main$sex_receivemoney___2 == 1 |
                          eip_main$sex_receivemoney___3 == 1 |
                          eip_main$sex_receivemoney___4 == 1 |
                          eip_main$sex_receivemoney___5 == 1 |
                          eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___0 == 1 |
                          eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___1 == 1 |
                          eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___2 == 1 |
                          eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___3 == 1 |
                          eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___4 == 1 |
                          eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___5 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$ht_assessed)


eip_main$ht_assessed_pulvino[(eip_main$unsafe_work == 0 | eip_main$unsafe_work == 1) |
                               (eip_main$forced_work == 0 | eip_main$forced_work == 1) |
                               (eip_main$fear_leave_work == 0 | eip_main$fear_leave_work == 1) |
                               (eip_main$exchange_for_sex == 0 | eip_main$exchange_for_sex == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$ht_assessed_pulvino)


eip_main$ht_pos_pulvino[eip_main$unsafe_work == 1 | eip_main$forced_work == 1 |
                          eip_main$fear_leave_work == 1 | eip_main$exchange_for_sex == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$ht_pos_pulvino)


table(eip_main$unsafe_work)
eip_main$unsafe_work_yes[eip_main$unsafe_work == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$unsafe_work_yes)
eip_main$unsafe_work_no[eip_main$unsafe_work == 0] <- 1
table(eip_main$unsafe_work_no)
eip_main$unsafe_work_not_asked[eip_main$unsafe_work == 2] <- 1
table(eip_main$unsafe_work_not_asked)
eip_main$unsafe_work_declined[eip_main$unsafe_work == 3] <- 1
table(eip_main$unsafe_work_declined)
table(eip_main$unsafe_work)
eip_main$unsafe_work_assessed[!is.na(eip_main$unsafe_work)] <- 1
table(eip_main$unsafe_work_assessed)


table(eip_main$forced_work)
eip_main$forced_work_yes[eip_main$forced_work == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$forced_work_yes)
eip_main$forced_work_no[eip_main$forced_work == 0] <- 1
table(eip_main$forced_work_no)
eip_main$forced_work_not_asked[eip_main$forced_work == 2] <- 1
table(eip_main$forced_work_not_asked)
eip_main$forced_work_declined[eip_main$forced_work == 3] <- 1
table(eip_main$forced_work_declined)
table(eip_main$forced_work)
eip_main$forced_work_assessed[!is.na(eip_main$forced_work)] <- 1
table(eip_main$forced_work_assessed)


table(eip_main$fear_leave_work)
eip_main$fear_leave_work_yes[eip_main$fear_leave_work == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$fear_leave_work_yes)
eip_main$fear_leave_work_no[eip_main$fear_leave_work == 0] <- 1
table(eip_main$fear_leave_work_no)
eip_main$fear_leave_work_not_asked[eip_main$fear_leave_work == 2] <- 1
table(eip_main$fear_leave_work_not_asked)
eip_main$fear_leave_work_declined[eip_main$fear_leave_work == 3] <- 1
table(eip_main$fear_leave_work_declined)
table(eip_main$fear_leave_work)
eip_main$fear_leave_work_assessed[!is.na(eip_main$fear_leave_work)] <- 1
table(eip_main$fear_leave_work_assessed)


table(eip_main$exchange_for_sex)
eip_main$exchange_for_sex_yes[eip_main$exchange_for_sex == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$exchange_for_sex_yes)
eip_main$exchange_for_sex_no[eip_main$exchange_for_sex == 0] <- 1
table(eip_main$exchange_for_sex_no)
eip_main$exchange_for_sex_not_asked[eip_main$exchange_for_sex == 2] <- 1
table(eip_main$exchange_for_sex_not_asked)
eip_main$exchange_for_sex_declined[eip_main$exchange_for_sex == 3] <- 1
table(eip_main$exchange_for_sex_declined)
table(eip_main$exchange_for_sex)
eip_main$exchange_for_sex_assessed[!is.na(eip_main$exchange_for_sex)] <- 1
table(eip_main$exchange_for_sex_assessed)


eip_main$exchange_for_sex_full[eip_main$exchange_for_sex == 1 |
                                 eip_main$sex_receivemoney___1 == 1 |
                                 eip_main$sex_receivemoney___2 == 1 |
                                 eip_main$sex_receivemoney___3 == 1 |
                                 eip_main$sex_receivemoney___4 == 1 |
                                 eip_main$sex_receivemoney___5 == 1 |
                                 eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___1 == 1 |
                                 eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___2 == 1 |
                                 eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___3 == 1 |
                                 eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___4 == 1 |
                                 eip_main$sex_receivedrugs___5 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$exchange_for_sex_full)


table(eip_main$safe_in_relationship)
eip_main$safe_in_relationship_assessed[!is.na(eip_main$safe_in_relationship)] <- 1
table(eip_main$safe_in_relationship_assessed)
eip_main$unsafe_relationship[eip_main$safe_in_relationship == 0] <- 1
table(eip_main$unsafe_relationship)


table(eip_main$pressure_sex)
eip_main$pressure_sex_assessed[!is.na(eip_main$pressure_sex)] <- 1
table(eip_main$pressure_sex_assessed)
eip_main$pressured_sex[eip_main$pressure_sex == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$pressured_sex)


# HT Referrals

eip_main$referred_for_ht[eip_main$referral_ht_checklist___1 == 1 |
                           eip_main$referral_ht_checklist___2 == 1 |
                           eip_main$referral_ht_checklist___3 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$referred_for_ht)


table(eip_main$hpa_suspect_trafficking)
eip_main$suspect_ht[eip_main$hpa_suspect_trafficking == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$suspect_ht)


table(eip_main$referred_for_ht, eip_main$suspect_ht)
eip_main$ht_suspected_referred[eip_main$suspect_ht == 1 &
                                 eip_main$referred_for_ht == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$ht_suspected_referred)


table(eip_main$referred_for_ht, eip_main$ht_pos_pulvino)
eip_main$ht_pos_referred[eip_main$ht_pos_pulvino == 1 &
                           eip_main$referred_for_ht == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$ht_pos_referred)




### PLWHA engaged in care at UCMC
### PLWHA engaged in care at WCH
### PLWHA engaged in care at Exchange
### PLWHA engaged in care at Talbert
### PLWHA and WOC engaged in care
### PLWHA and Youth (18-29) engaged in care
### PLWHA and IDU engaged in care



# PLWHA/MSM New CTR Positive

table(eip_main$NewCTRpos, eip_main$MSM)
eip_main$NewCTRpos_MSM[eip_main$NewCTRpos == 1 & eip_main$MSM == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$NewCTRpos_MSM)


table(eip_main$NewCTRpos, eip_main$HRHS)
eip_main$NewCTRpos_HRHS[eip_main$NewCTRpos == 1 & eip_main$HRHS == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$NewCTRpos_HRHS)




# HIV Linkage Data

table(eip_main$ltc_services___1)
eip_main$hiv_linkage_case[eip_main$ltc_services___1 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_linkage_case)


# Ineligible HIV Linkage - Already Linked

table(eip_main$ltc_hiv_declined_rsn___23)
table(eip_main$ltc_hiv_prevented_rsn___16)
eip_main$hiv_already_linked[eip_main$hiv_linkage_case == 1 &
                              (eip_main$ltc_hiv_declined_rsn___23 == 1 |
                                 eip_main$ltc_hiv_prevented_rsn___16 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_already_linked)




# Ineligible HIV Linkage - Deceased

table(eip_main$ltc_hiv_declined_rsn___35)
table(eip_main$ltc_hiv_prevented_rsn___17)
eip_main$hiv_deceased[eip_main$hiv_linkage_case == 1 &
                              (eip_main$ltc_hiv_declined_rsn___35 == 1 |
                                 eip_main$ltc_hiv_prevented_rsn___17 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_deceased)




# Ineligible HIV Linkage - Incarcerated

table(eip_main$ltc_hiv_prevented_rsn___12)
eip_main$hiv_incarcerated[eip_main$hiv_linkage_case == 1 &
                            eip_main$ltc_hiv_prevented_rsn___12 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_incarcerated)




# Ineligible HIV Linkage - Declined Linkage Service

table(eip_main$ltc_hiv_final_ltc_status)
eip_main$hiv_linkage_declined[(eip_main$hiv_linkage_case == 1 &
                                eip_main$ltc_hiv_final_ltc_status == 2) &
                                (is.na(eip_main$hiv_already_linked) &
                                   is.na(eip_main$hiv_deceased) &
                                   is.na(eip_main$hiv_incarcerated))] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_linkage_declined)




# HIV Eligibility to be Linked

eip_main$hiv_eligible_linkage[eip_main$hiv_linkage_case == 1 &
                                (is.na(eip_main$hiv_already_linked) &
                                   is.na(eip_main$hiv_deceased) &
                                   is.na(eip_main$hiv_incarcerated) &
                                   is.na(eip_main$hiv_linkage_declined))] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_eligible_linkage)


table(eip_main$hiv_eligible_linkage, eip_main$HIVstatus)
eip_main$hiv_new_eligible_linkage[eip_main$hiv_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                                    eip_main$HIVstatus == 'New HIV Diagnosis'] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_new_eligible_linkage)


table(eip_main$hiv_eligible_linkage, eip_main$HIVstatus)
eip_main$hiv_prev_eligible_linkage[eip_main$hiv_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                                    eip_main$HIVstatus == 'Previous HIV Diagnosis'] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_prev_eligible_linkage)


table(eip_main$hiv_eligible_linkage, eip_main$HIVstatus)
eip_main$hiv_unk_eligible_linkage[(eip_main$hiv_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                                    (eip_main$HIVstatus == 'Unknown HIV Status' |
                                       is.na(eip_main$HIVstatus)))] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_unk_eligible_linkage)




# HIV Open/Closed Cases

table(eip_main$ltc_hiv_open_case_calc)
eip_main$hiv_open_case[eip_main$hiv_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                         eip_main$ltc_hiv_open_case_calc == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_open_case)


table(eip_main$hiv_open_case, eip_main$HIVstatus)
eip_main$hiv_new_open_case[eip_main$hiv_open_case == 1 &
                             eip_main$HIVstatus == 'New HIV Diagnosis'] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_new_open_case)


table(eip_main$hiv_open_case, eip_main$HIVstatus)
eip_main$hiv_prev_open_case[eip_main$hiv_open_case == 1 &
                             eip_main$HIVstatus == 'Previous HIV Diagnosis'] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_prev_open_case)


table(eip_main$hiv_open_case, eip_main$HIVstatus)
eip_main$hiv_unk_open_case[eip_main$hiv_open_case == 1 &
                              (eip_main$HIVstatus == 'Unknown HIV Diagnosis' |
                                 is.na(eip_main$HIVstatus))] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_unk_open_case)


table(eip_main$hiv_eligible_linkage, eip_main$hiv_open_case)
eip_main$hiv_closed_case[eip_main$hiv_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                           eip_main$hiv_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                           is.na(eip_main$hiv_open_case)] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_closed_case)




# HIV Cases Linked to Care

table(eip_main$hiv_closed_case, eip_main$ltc_hiv_final_ltc_status)
eip_main$hiv_linked[eip_main$hiv_closed_case == 1 &
                      eip_main$ltc_hiv_final_ltc_status == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_linked)


table(eip_main$HIVstatus, eip_main$hiv_eligible_linkage)
table(eip_main$hiv_linked, eip_main$HIVstatus)
eip_main$hiv_new_linked[eip_main$hiv_linked == 1 &
                          eip_main$HIVstatus == 'New HIV Diagnosis'] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_new_linked)


table(eip_main$HIVstatus, eip_main$hiv_eligible_linkage)
table(eip_main$hiv_linked, eip_main$HIVstatus)
eip_main$hiv_prev_linked[eip_main$hiv_linked == 1 &
                          eip_main$HIVstatus == 'Previous HIV Diagnosis'] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_prev_linked)


table(eip_main$HIVstatus, eip_main$hiv_eligible_linkage)
table(eip_main$hiv_linked, eip_main$HIVstatus)
eip_main$hiv_unk_linked[eip_main$hiv_linked == 1 &
                           (eip_main$HIVstatus == 'Unknown HIV Diagnosis' |
                              is.na(eip_main$HIVstatus))] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_unk_linked)


# HIV Reasons Not Linked to Care

eip_main$hiv_not_linked_med_staff[(eip_main$hiv_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$hiv_linked)) &
                                    (eip_main$ltc_hiv_prevented_rsn___1 == 1 |
                                       eip_main$ltc_hiv_prevented_rsn___2 == 1 |
                                       eip_main$ltc_hiv_prevented_rsn___11 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_not_linked_med_staff)


eip_main$hiv_not_linked_family[(eip_main$hiv_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$hiv_linked)) &
                                 (eip_main$ltc_hiv_prevented_rsn___3 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_not_linked_family)


eip_main$hiv_not_linked_not_talking[(eip_main$hiv_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$hiv_linked)) &
                                      (eip_main$ltc_hiv_prevented_rsn___4 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_not_linked_not_talking)


eip_main$hiv_not_linked_safety[(eip_main$hiv_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$hiv_linked)) &
                                 (eip_main$ltc_hiv_prevented_rsn___5 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_not_linked_safety)


eip_main$hiv_not_linked_medical[(eip_main$hiv_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$hiv_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_hiv_prevented_rsn___6 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_hiv_prevented_rsn___8)] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_not_linked_medical)


eip_main$hiv_not_linked_contact[(eip_main$hiv_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$hiv_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_hiv_prevented_rsn___7 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_hiv_prevented_rsn___13 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_hiv_prevented_rsn___14 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_not_linked_contact)


eip_main$hiv_not_linked_contact[(eip_main$hiv_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$hiv_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_hiv_prevented_rsn___7 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_hiv_prevented_rsn___13 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_hiv_prevented_rsn___14 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_not_linked_contact)


eip_main$hiv_not_linked_language[(eip_main$hiv_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$hiv_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_hiv_prevented_rsn___9 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_not_linked_language)


eip_main$hiv_not_linked_other[(eip_main$hiv_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$hiv_linked)) &
                                   (eip_main$ltc_hiv_prevented_rsn___10 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$hiv_not_linked_other)




# HT Linkage Data

table(eip_main$additional_services___9)
eip_main$ht_linkage_case[eip_main$additional_services___9 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$ht_linkage_case)


# Ineligible HT Linkage - Already Linked

table(eip_main$ltc_ht_declined_rsn___23)
#table(eip_main$ltc_ht_prevented_rsn___16)
eip_main$ht_already_linked[eip_main$ht_linkage_case == 1 &
                              (eip_main$ltc_ht_declined_rsn___23 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$ht_already_linked)




# Ineligible HT Linkage - Deceased

table(eip_main$ltc_ht_declined_rsn___35)
table(eip_main$ltc_ht_prevented_rsn___17)
eip_main$ht_deceased[eip_main$ht_linkage_case == 1 &
                        (eip_main$ltc_ht_declined_rsn___35 == 1 |
                           eip_main$ltc_ht_prevented_rsn___17 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$ht_deceased)




# Ineligible HT Linkage - Incarcerated

table(eip_main$ltc_ht_prevented_rsn___12)
eip_main$ht_incarcerated[eip_main$ht_linkage_case == 1 &
                            eip_main$ltc_ht_prevented_rsn___12 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$ht_incarcerated)




# Ineligible HT Linkage - Declined Linkage Service

table(eip_main$ltc_ht_final_ltc_status)
eip_main$ht_linkage_declined[(eip_main$ht_linkage_case == 1 &
                                 eip_main$ltc_ht_final_ltc_status == 2) &
                                (is.na(eip_main$ht_already_linked) &
                                   is.na(eip_main$ht_deceased) &
                                   is.na(eip_main$ht_incarcerated))] <- 1
table(eip_main$ht_linkage_declined)




# HT Eligibility to be Linked

eip_main$ht_eligible_linkage[eip_main$ht_linkage_case == 1 &
                                (is.na(eip_main$ht_already_linked) &
                                   is.na(eip_main$ht_deceased) &
                                   is.na(eip_main$ht_incarcerated) &
                                   is.na(eip_main$ht_linkage_declined))] <- 1
table(eip_main$ht_eligible_linkage)




# HT Open/Closed Cases

table(eip_main$ltc_ht_open_case_calc)
eip_main$ht_open_case[eip_main$ht_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                         eip_main$ltc_ht_open_case_calc == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$ht_open_case)


table(eip_main$ht_eligible_linkage, eip_main$ht_open_case)
eip_main$ht_closed_case[eip_main$ht_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                           is.na(eip_main$ht_open_case)] <- 1
table(eip_main$ht_closed_case)




# HT Cases Linked to Care

table(eip_main$ht_closed_case, eip_main$ltc_ht_final_ltc_status)
eip_main$ht_linked[eip_main$ht_closed_case == 1 &
                      eip_main$ltc_ht_final_ltc_status == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$ht_linked)




# HT Reasons Not Linked to Care

eip_main$ht_not_linked_med_staff[(eip_main$ht_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$ht_linked)) &
                                    (eip_main$ltc_ht_prevented_rsn___1 == 1 |
                                       eip_main$ltc_ht_prevented_rsn___2 == 1 |
                                       eip_main$ltc_ht_prevented_rsn___11 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$ht_not_linked_med_staff)


eip_main$ht_not_linked_family[(eip_main$ht_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$ht_linked)) &
                                 (eip_main$ltc_ht_prevented_rsn___3 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$ht_not_linked_family)


eip_main$ht_not_linked_not_talking[(eip_main$ht_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$ht_linked)) &
                                      (eip_main$ltc_ht_prevented_rsn___4 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$ht_not_linked_not_talking)


eip_main$ht_not_linked_safety[(eip_main$ht_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$ht_linked)) &
                                 (eip_main$ltc_ht_prevented_rsn___5 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$ht_not_linked_safety)


eip_main$ht_not_linked_medical[(eip_main$ht_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$ht_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_ht_prevented_rsn___6 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_ht_prevented_rsn___8)] <- 1
table(eip_main$ht_not_linked_medical)


eip_main$ht_not_linked_contact[(eip_main$ht_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$ht_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_ht_prevented_rsn___7 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_ht_prevented_rsn___13 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_ht_prevented_rsn___14 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$ht_not_linked_contact)


eip_main$ht_not_linked_contact[(eip_main$ht_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$ht_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_ht_prevented_rsn___7 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_ht_prevented_rsn___13 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_ht_prevented_rsn___14 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$ht_not_linked_contact)


eip_main$ht_not_linked_language[(eip_main$ht_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$ht_linked)) &
                                   (eip_main$ltc_ht_prevented_rsn___9 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$ht_not_linked_language)


eip_main$ht_not_linked_other[(eip_main$ht_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$ht_linked)) &
                                (eip_main$ltc_ht_prevented_rsn___10 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$ht_not_linked_other)




# SUD Linkage Data

table(eip_main$ltc_services___3)
eip_main$sud_linkage_case[eip_main$ltc_services___3 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$sud_linkage_case)


# Ineligible SUD Linkage - Already Linked

table(eip_main$ltc_sud_declined_rsn___23)
table(eip_main$ltc_sud_prevented_rsn___16)
eip_main$sud_already_linked[eip_main$sud_linkage_case == 1 &
                              (eip_main$ltc_sud_declined_rsn___23 == 1 |
                                 eip_main$ltc_sud_prevented_rsn___16 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$sud_already_linked)




# Ineligible SUD Linkage - Deceased

table(eip_main$ltc_sud_declined_rsn___35)
table(eip_main$ltc_sud_prevented_rsn___17)
eip_main$sud_deceased[eip_main$sud_linkage_case == 1 &
                        (eip_main$ltc_sud_declined_rsn___35 == 1 |
                           eip_main$ltc_sud_prevented_rsn___17 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$sud_deceased)




# Ineligible SUD Linkage - Incarcerated

table(eip_main$ltc_sud_prevented_rsn___12)
eip_main$sud_incarcerated[eip_main$sud_linkage_case == 1 &
                            eip_main$ltc_sud_prevented_rsn___12 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$sud_incarcerated)




# Ineligible SUD Linkage - Declined Linkage Service

table(eip_main$ltc_sud_final_ltc_status)
eip_main$sud_linkage_declined[(eip_main$sud_linkage_case == 1 &
                                 eip_main$ltc_sud_final_ltc_status == 2) &
                                (is.na(eip_main$sud_already_linked) &
                                   is.na(eip_main$sud_deceased) &
                                   is.na(eip_main$sud_incarcerated))] <- 1
table(eip_main$sud_linkage_declined)




# SUD Eligibility to be Linked

eip_main$sud_eligible_linkage[eip_main$sud_linkage_case == 1 &
                                (is.na(eip_main$sud_already_linked) &
                                   is.na(eip_main$sud_deceased) &
                                   is.na(eip_main$sud_incarcerated) &
                                   is.na(eip_main$sud_linkage_declined))] <- 1
table(eip_main$sud_eligible_linkage)



# SUD Open/Closed Cases

table(eip_main$ltc_sud_open_case_calc)
eip_main$sud_open_case[eip_main$sud_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                         eip_main$ltc_sud_open_case_calc == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$sud_open_case)


table(eip_main$sud_eligible_linkage, eip_main$sud_open_case)
eip_main$sud_closed_case[eip_main$sud_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                           eip_main$sud_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                           is.na(eip_main$sud_open_case)] <- 1
table(eip_main$sud_closed_case)




# SUD Cases Linked to Care

table(eip_main$sud_closed_case, eip_main$ltc_sud_final_ltc_status)
eip_main$sud_linked[eip_main$sud_closed_case == 1 &
                      eip_main$ltc_sud_final_ltc_status == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$sud_linked)




# SUD Reasons Not Linked to Care

eip_main$sud_not_linked_med_staff[(eip_main$sud_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$sud_linked)) &
                                    (eip_main$ltc_sud_prevented_rsn___1 == 1 |
                                       eip_main$ltc_sud_prevented_rsn___2 == 1 |
                                       eip_main$ltc_sud_prevented_rsn___11 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$sud_not_linked_med_staff)


eip_main$sud_not_linked_family[(eip_main$sud_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$sud_linked)) &
                                 (eip_main$ltc_sud_prevented_rsn___3 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$sud_not_linked_family)


eip_main$sud_not_linked_not_talking[(eip_main$sud_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$sud_linked)) &
                                      (eip_main$ltc_sud_prevented_rsn___4 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$sud_not_linked_not_talking)


eip_main$sud_not_linked_safety[(eip_main$sud_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$sud_linked)) &
                                 (eip_main$ltc_sud_prevented_rsn___5 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$sud_not_linked_safety)


eip_main$sud_not_linked_medical[(eip_main$sud_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$sud_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_sud_prevented_rsn___6 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_sud_prevented_rsn___8)] <- 1
table(eip_main$sud_not_linked_medical)


eip_main$sud_not_linked_contact[(eip_main$sud_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$sud_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_sud_prevented_rsn___7 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_sud_prevented_rsn___13 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_sud_prevented_rsn___14 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$sud_not_linked_contact)


eip_main$sud_not_linked_contact[(eip_main$sud_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$sud_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_sud_prevented_rsn___7 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_sud_prevented_rsn___13 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_sud_prevented_rsn___14 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$sud_not_linked_contact)


eip_main$sud_not_linked_language[(eip_main$sud_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$sud_linked)) &
                                   (eip_main$ltc_sud_prevented_rsn___9 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$sud_not_linked_language)


eip_main$sud_not_linked_other[(eip_main$sud_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$sud_linked)) &
                                (eip_main$ltc_sud_prevented_rsn___10 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$sud_not_linked_other)




# PrEP Linkage Data

table(eip_main$ltc_services___5)
eip_main$prep_linkage_case[eip_main$ltc_services___5 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$prep_linkage_case)


# Ineligible PrEP Linkage - Already Linked

table(eip_main$ltc_prep_declined_rsn___23)
eip_main$prep_already_linked[eip_main$prep_linkage_case == 1 &
                              (eip_main$ltc_prep_declined_rsn___23 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$prep_already_linked)




# Ineligible PrEP Linkage - Deceased

table(eip_main$ltc_prep_declined_rsn___35)
table(eip_main$ltc_prep_prevented_rsn___17)
eip_main$prep_deceased[eip_main$prep_linkage_case == 1 &
                        (eip_main$ltc_prep_declined_rsn___35 == 1 |
                           eip_main$ltc_prep_prevented_rsn___17 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$prep_deceased)




# Ineligible PrEP Linkage - Incarcerated

table(eip_main$ltc_prep_prevented_rsn___12)
eip_main$prep_incarcerated[eip_main$prep_linkage_case == 1 &
                            eip_main$ltc_prep_prevented_rsn___12 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$prep_incarcerated)




# Ineligible PrEP Linkage - Declined Linkage Service

table(eip_main$ltc_prep_final_ltc_status)
eip_main$prep_linkage_declined[(eip_main$prep_linkage_case == 1 &
                                 eip_main$ltc_prep_final_ltc_status == 2) &
                                (is.na(eip_main$prep_already_linked) &
                                   is.na(eip_main$prep_deceased) &
                                   is.na(eip_main$prep_incarcerated))] <- 1
table(eip_main$prep_linkage_declined)




# PrEP Eligibility to be Linked

eip_main$prep_eligible_linkage[eip_main$prep_linkage_case == 1 &
                                (is.na(eip_main$prep_already_linked) &
                                   is.na(eip_main$prep_deceased) &
                                   is.na(eip_main$prep_incarcerated) &
                                   is.na(eip_main$prep_linkage_declined))] <- 1
table(eip_main$prep_eligible_linkage)



# PrEP Open/Closed Cases

table(eip_main$ltc_prep_open_case_calc)
eip_main$prep_open_case[eip_main$prep_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                         eip_main$ltc_prep_open_case_calc == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$prep_open_case)


table(eip_main$prep_eligible_linkage, eip_main$prep_open_case)
eip_main$prep_closed_case[eip_main$prep_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                           eip_main$prep_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                           is.na(eip_main$prep_open_case)] <- 1
table(eip_main$prep_closed_case)




# PrEP Cases Linked to Care

table(eip_main$prep_closed_case, eip_main$ltc_prep_final_ltc_status)
eip_main$prep_linked[eip_main$prep_closed_case == 1 &
                      eip_main$ltc_prep_final_ltc_status == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$prep_linked)




# PrEP Reasons Not Linked to Care

eip_main$prep_not_linked_med_staff[(eip_main$prep_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$prep_linked)) &
                                    (eip_main$ltc_prep_prevented_rsn___1 == 1 |
                                       eip_main$ltc_prep_prevented_rsn___2 == 1 |
                                       eip_main$ltc_prep_prevented_rsn___11 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$prep_not_linked_med_staff)


eip_main$prep_not_linked_family[(eip_main$prep_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$prep_linked)) &
                                 (eip_main$ltc_prep_prevented_rsn___3 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$prep_not_linked_family)


eip_main$prep_not_linked_not_talking[(eip_main$prep_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$prep_linked)) &
                                      (eip_main$ltc_prep_prevented_rsn___4 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$prep_not_linked_not_talking)


eip_main$prep_not_linked_safety[(eip_main$prep_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$prep_linked)) &
                                 (eip_main$ltc_prep_prevented_rsn___5 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$prep_not_linked_safety)


eip_main$prep_not_linked_medical[(eip_main$prep_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$prep_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_prep_prevented_rsn___6 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_prep_prevented_rsn___8)] <- 1
table(eip_main$prep_not_linked_medical)


eip_main$prep_not_linked_contact[(eip_main$prep_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$prep_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_prep_prevented_rsn___7 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_prep_prevented_rsn___13 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_prep_prevented_rsn___14 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$prep_not_linked_contact)


eip_main$prep_not_linked_contact[(eip_main$prep_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$prep_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_prep_prevented_rsn___7 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_prep_prevented_rsn___13 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_prep_prevented_rsn___14 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$prep_not_linked_contact)


eip_main$prep_not_linked_language[(eip_main$prep_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$prep_linked)) &
                                   (eip_main$ltc_prep_prevented_rsn___9 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$prep_not_linked_language)


eip_main$prep_not_linked_other[(eip_main$prep_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$prep_linked)) &
                                (eip_main$ltc_prep_prevented_rsn___10 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$prep_not_linked_other)




# MH Linkage Data

table(eip_main$additional_services___1)
eip_main$mh_linkage_case[eip_main$additional_services___1 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$mh_linkage_case)


# Ineligible MH Linkage - Already Linked

table(eip_main$ltc_mh_declined_rsn___23)
eip_main$mh_already_linked[eip_main$mh_linkage_case == 1 &
                               (eip_main$ltc_mh_declined_rsn___23 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$mh_already_linked)




# Ineligible MH Linkage - Deceased

table(eip_main$ltc_mh_declined_rsn___35)
table(eip_main$ltc_mh_prevented_rsn___17)
eip_main$mh_deceased[eip_main$mh_linkage_case == 1 &
                         (eip_main$ltc_mh_declined_rsn___35 == 1 |
                            eip_main$ltc_mh_prevented_rsn___17 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$mh_deceased)




# Ineligible MH Linkage - Incarcerated

table(eip_main$ltc_mh_prevented_rsn___12)
eip_main$mh_incarcerated[eip_main$mh_linkage_case == 1 &
                             eip_main$ltc_mh_prevented_rsn___12 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$mh_incarcerated)




# Ineligible MH Linkage - Declined Linkage Service

table(eip_main$ltc_mh_final_ltc_status)
eip_main$mh_linkage_declined[(eip_main$mh_linkage_case == 1 &
                                  eip_main$ltc_mh_final_ltc_status == 2) &
                                 (is.na(eip_main$mh_already_linked) &
                                    is.na(eip_main$mh_deceased) &
                                    is.na(eip_main$mh_incarcerated))] <- 1
table(eip_main$mh_linkage_declined)




# MH Eligibility to be Linked

eip_main$mh_eligible_linkage[eip_main$mh_linkage_case == 1 &
                                 (is.na(eip_main$mh_already_linked) &
                                    is.na(eip_main$mh_deceased) &
                                    is.na(eip_main$mh_incarcerated) &
                                    is.na(eip_main$mh_linkage_declined))] <- 1
table(eip_main$mh_eligible_linkage)



# MH Open/Closed Cases

table(eip_main$ltc_mh_open_case_calc)
eip_main$mh_open_case[eip_main$mh_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                          eip_main$ltc_mh_open_case_calc == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$mh_open_case)


table(eip_main$mh_eligible_linkage, eip_main$mh_open_case)
eip_main$mh_closed_case[eip_main$mh_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                            is.na(eip_main$mh_open_case)] <- 1
table(eip_main$mh_closed_case)




# MH Cases Linked to Care

table(eip_main$mh_closed_case, eip_main$ltc_mh_final_ltc_status)
eip_main$mh_linked[eip_main$mh_closed_case == 1 &
                       eip_main$ltc_mh_final_ltc_status == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$mh_linked)




# MH Reasons Not Linked to Care

eip_main$mh_not_linked_med_staff[(eip_main$mh_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$mh_linked)) &
                                    (eip_main$ltc_mh_prevented_rsn___1 == 1 |
                                       eip_main$ltc_mh_prevented_rsn___2 == 1 |
                                       eip_main$ltc_mh_prevented_rsn___11 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$mh_not_linked_med_staff)


eip_main$mh_not_linked_family[(eip_main$mh_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$mh_linked)) &
                                 (eip_main$ltc_mh_prevented_rsn___3 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$mh_not_linked_family)


eip_main$mh_not_linked_not_talking[(eip_main$mh_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$mh_linked)) &
                                      (eip_main$ltc_mh_prevented_rsn___4 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$mh_not_linked_not_talking)


eip_main$mh_not_linked_safety[(eip_main$mh_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$mh_linked)) &
                                 (eip_main$ltc_mh_prevented_rsn___5 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$mh_not_linked_safety)


eip_main$mh_not_linked_medical[(eip_main$mh_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$mh_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_mh_prevented_rsn___6 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_mh_prevented_rsn___8)] <- 1
table(eip_main$mh_not_linked_medical)


eip_main$mh_not_linked_contact[(eip_main$mh_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$mh_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_mh_prevented_rsn___7 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_mh_prevented_rsn___13 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_mh_prevented_rsn___14 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$mh_not_linked_contact)


eip_main$mh_not_linked_contact[(eip_main$mh_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$mh_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_mh_prevented_rsn___7 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_mh_prevented_rsn___13 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_mh_prevented_rsn___14 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$mh_not_linked_contact)


eip_main$mh_not_linked_language[(eip_main$mh_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$mh_linked)) &
                                   (eip_main$ltc_mh_prevented_rsn___9 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$mh_not_linked_language)


eip_main$mh_not_linked_other[(eip_main$mh_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$mh_linked)) &
                                (eip_main$ltc_mh_prevented_rsn___10 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$mh_not_linked_other)




# Housing Linkage Data

table(eip_main$additional_services___2)
eip_main$housing_linkage_case[eip_main$additional_services___2 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$housing_linkage_case)


# Ineligible Housing Linkage - Already Linked

table(eip_main$ltc_housing_declined_rsn___23)
eip_main$housing_already_linked[eip_main$housing_linkage_case == 1 &
                             (eip_main$ltc_housing_declined_rsn___23 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$housing_already_linked)




# Ineligible Housing Linkage - Deceased

table(eip_main$ltc_housing_declined_rsn___35)
table(eip_main$ltc_housing_prevented_rsn___17)
eip_main$housing_deceased[eip_main$housing_linkage_case == 1 &
                       (eip_main$ltc_housing_declined_rsn___35 == 1 |
                          eip_main$ltc_housing_prevented_rsn___17 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$housing_deceased)




# Ineligible Housing Linkage - Incarcerated

table(eip_main$ltc_housing_prevented_rsn___12)
eip_main$housing_incarcerated[eip_main$housing_linkage_case == 1 &
                           eip_main$ltc_housing_prevented_rsn___12 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$housing_incarcerated)




# Ineligible Housing Linkage - Declined Linkage Service

table(eip_main$ltc_housing_final_ltc_status)
eip_main$housing_linkage_declined[(eip_main$housing_linkage_case == 1 &
                                eip_main$ltc_housing_final_ltc_status == 2) &
                               (is.na(eip_main$housing_already_linked) &
                                  is.na(eip_main$housing_deceased) &
                                  is.na(eip_main$housing_incarcerated))] <- 1
table(eip_main$housing_linkage_declined)




# Housing Eligibility to be Linked

eip_main$housing_eligible_linkage[eip_main$housing_linkage_case == 1 &
                               (is.na(eip_main$housing_already_linked) &
                                  is.na(eip_main$housing_deceased) &
                                  is.na(eip_main$housing_incarcerated) &
                                  is.na(eip_main$housing_linkage_declined))] <- 1
table(eip_main$housing_eligible_linkage)



# Housing Open/Closed Cases

table(eip_main$ltc_housing_open_case_calc)
eip_main$housing_open_case[eip_main$housing_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                        eip_main$ltc_housing_open_case_calc == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$housing_open_case)


table(eip_main$housing_eligible_linkage, eip_main$housing_open_case)
eip_main$housing_closed_case[eip_main$housing_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                          is.na(eip_main$housing_open_case)] <- 1
table(eip_main$housing_closed_case)




# Housing Cases Linked to Care

table(eip_main$housing_closed_case, eip_main$ltc_housing_final_ltc_status)
eip_main$housing_linked[eip_main$housing_closed_case == 1 &
                     eip_main$ltc_housing_final_ltc_status == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$housing_linked)




# Housing Reasons Not Linked to Care

eip_main$housing_not_linked_med_staff[(eip_main$housing_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$housing_linked)) &
                                    (eip_main$ltc_housing_prevented_rsn___1 == 1 |
                                       eip_main$ltc_housing_prevented_rsn___2 == 1 |
                                       eip_main$ltc_housing_prevented_rsn___11 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$housing_not_linked_med_staff)


eip_main$housing_not_linked_family[(eip_main$housing_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$housing_linked)) &
                                 (eip_main$ltc_housing_prevented_rsn___3 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$housing_not_linked_family)


eip_main$housing_not_linked_not_talking[(eip_main$housing_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$housing_linked)) &
                                      (eip_main$ltc_housing_prevented_rsn___4 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$housing_not_linked_not_talking)


eip_main$housing_not_linked_safety[(eip_main$housing_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$housing_linked)) &
                                 (eip_main$ltc_housing_prevented_rsn___5 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$housing_not_linked_safety)


eip_main$housing_not_linked_medical[(eip_main$housing_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$housing_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_housing_prevented_rsn___6 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_housing_prevented_rsn___8)] <- 1
table(eip_main$housing_not_linked_medical)


eip_main$housing_not_linked_contact[(eip_main$housing_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$housing_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_housing_prevented_rsn___7 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_housing_prevented_rsn___13 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_housing_prevented_rsn___14 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$housing_not_linked_contact)


eip_main$housing_not_linked_contact[(eip_main$housing_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$housing_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_housing_prevented_rsn___7 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_housing_prevented_rsn___13 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_housing_prevented_rsn___14 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$housing_not_linked_contact)


eip_main$housing_not_linked_language[(eip_main$housing_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$housing_linked)) &
                                   (eip_main$ltc_housing_prevented_rsn___9 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$housing_not_linked_language)


eip_main$housing_not_linked_other[(eip_main$housing_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$housing_linked)) &
                                (eip_main$ltc_housing_prevented_rsn___10 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$housing_not_linked_other)




# Food Linkage Data

table(eip_main$additional_services___4)
eip_main$food_linkage_case[eip_main$additional_services___4 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$food_linkage_case)


# Ineligible Food Linkage - Already Linked

table(eip_main$ltc_food_declined_rsn___23)
eip_main$food_already_linked[eip_main$food_linkage_case == 1 &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_food_declined_rsn___23 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$food_already_linked)




# Ineligible Food Linkage - Deceased

table(eip_main$ltc_food_declined_rsn___35)
table(eip_main$ltc_food_prevented_rsn___17)
eip_main$food_deceased[eip_main$food_linkage_case == 1 &
                            (eip_main$ltc_food_declined_rsn___35 == 1 |
                               eip_main$ltc_food_prevented_rsn___17 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$food_deceased)




# Ineligible Food Linkage - Incarcerated

table(eip_main$ltc_food_prevented_rsn___12)
eip_main$food_incarcerated[eip_main$food_linkage_case == 1 &
                                eip_main$ltc_food_prevented_rsn___12 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$food_incarcerated)




# Ineligible Food Linkage - Declined Linkage Service

table(eip_main$ltc_food_final_ltc_status)
eip_main$food_linkage_declined[(eip_main$food_linkage_case == 1 &
                                     eip_main$ltc_food_final_ltc_status == 2) &
                                    (is.na(eip_main$food_already_linked) &
                                       is.na(eip_main$food_deceased) &
                                       is.na(eip_main$food_incarcerated))] <- 1
table(eip_main$food_linkage_declined)




# Food Eligibility to be Linked

eip_main$food_eligible_linkage[eip_main$food_linkage_case == 1 &
                                    (is.na(eip_main$food_already_linked) &
                                       is.na(eip_main$food_deceased) &
                                       is.na(eip_main$food_incarcerated) &
                                       is.na(eip_main$food_linkage_declined))] <- 1
table(eip_main$food_eligible_linkage)



# Food Open/Closed Cases

table(eip_main$ltc_food_open_case_calc)
eip_main$food_open_case[eip_main$food_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                             eip_main$ltc_food_open_case_calc == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$food_open_case)


table(eip_main$food_eligible_linkage, eip_main$food_open_case)
eip_main$food_closed_case[eip_main$food_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                               is.na(eip_main$food_open_case)] <- 1
table(eip_main$food_closed_case)




# Food Cases Linked to Care

table(eip_main$food_closed_case, eip_main$ltc_food_final_ltc_status)
eip_main$food_linked[eip_main$food_closed_case == 1 &
                          eip_main$ltc_food_final_ltc_status == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$food_linked)




# Food Reasons Not Linked to Care

eip_main$food_not_linked_med_staff[(eip_main$food_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$food_linked)) &
                                    (eip_main$ltc_food_prevented_rsn___1 == 1 |
                                       eip_main$ltc_food_prevented_rsn___2 == 1 |
                                       eip_main$ltc_food_prevented_rsn___11 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$food_not_linked_med_staff)


eip_main$food_not_linked_family[(eip_main$food_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$food_linked)) &
                                 (eip_main$ltc_food_prevented_rsn___3 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$food_not_linked_family)


eip_main$food_not_linked_not_talking[(eip_main$food_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$food_linked)) &
                                      (eip_main$ltc_food_prevented_rsn___4 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$food_not_linked_not_talking)


eip_main$food_not_linked_safety[(eip_main$food_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$food_linked)) &
                                 (eip_main$ltc_food_prevented_rsn___5 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$food_not_linked_safety)


eip_main$food_not_linked_medical[(eip_main$food_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$food_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_food_prevented_rsn___6 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_food_prevented_rsn___8)] <- 1
table(eip_main$food_not_linked_medical)


eip_main$food_not_linked_contact[(eip_main$food_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$food_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_food_prevented_rsn___7 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_food_prevented_rsn___13 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_food_prevented_rsn___14 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$food_not_linked_contact)


eip_main$food_not_linked_contact[(eip_main$food_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$food_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_food_prevented_rsn___7 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_food_prevented_rsn___13 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_food_prevented_rsn___14 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$food_not_linked_contact)


eip_main$food_not_linked_language[(eip_main$food_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$food_linked)) &
                                   (eip_main$ltc_food_prevented_rsn___9 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$food_not_linked_language)


eip_main$food_not_linked_other[(eip_main$food_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$food_linked)) &
                                (eip_main$ltc_food_prevented_rsn___10 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$food_not_linked_other)




# Financial Linkage Data

table(eip_main$additional_services___5)
eip_main$financial_linkage_case[eip_main$additional_services___5 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$financial_linkage_case)


# Ineligible Financial Linkage - Already Linked

table(eip_main$ltc_financial_declined_rsn___23)
eip_main$financial_already_linked[eip_main$financial_linkage_case == 1 &
                               (eip_main$ltc_financial_declined_rsn___23 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$financial_already_linked)




# Ineligible Financial Linkage - Deceased

table(eip_main$ltc_financial_declined_rsn___35)
table(eip_main$ltc_financial_prevented_rsn___17)
eip_main$financial_deceased[eip_main$financial_linkage_case == 1 &
                         (eip_main$ltc_financial_declined_rsn___35 == 1 |
                            eip_main$ltc_financial_prevented_rsn___17 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$financial_deceased)




# Ineligible Financial Linkage - Incarcerated

table(eip_main$ltc_financial_prevented_rsn___12)
eip_main$financial_incarcerated[eip_main$financial_linkage_case == 1 &
                             eip_main$ltc_financial_prevented_rsn___12 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$financial_incarcerated)




# Ineligible Financial Linkage - Declined Linkage Service

table(eip_main$ltc_financial_final_ltc_status)
eip_main$financial_linkage_declined[(eip_main$financial_linkage_case == 1 &
                                  eip_main$ltc_financial_final_ltc_status == 2) &
                                 (is.na(eip_main$financial_already_linked) &
                                    is.na(eip_main$financial_deceased) &
                                    is.na(eip_main$financial_incarcerated))] <- 1
table(eip_main$financial_linkage_declined)




# Financial Eligibility to be Linked

eip_main$financial_eligible_linkage[eip_main$financial_linkage_case == 1 &
                                 (is.na(eip_main$financial_already_linked) &
                                    is.na(eip_main$financial_deceased) &
                                    is.na(eip_main$financial_incarcerated) &
                                    is.na(eip_main$financial_linkage_declined))] <- 1
table(eip_main$financial_eligible_linkage)



# Financial Open/Closed Cases

table(eip_main$ltc_financial_open_case_calc)
eip_main$financial_open_case[eip_main$financial_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                          eip_main$ltc_financial_open_case_calc == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$financial_open_case)


table(eip_main$financial_eligible_linkage, eip_main$financial_open_case)
eip_main$financial_closed_case[eip_main$financial_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                            is.na(eip_main$financial_open_case)] <- 1
table(eip_main$financial_closed_case)




# Financial Cases Linked to Care

table(eip_main$financial_closed_case, eip_main$ltc_financial_final_ltc_status)
eip_main$financial_linked[eip_main$financial_closed_case == 1 &
                       eip_main$ltc_financial_final_ltc_status == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$financial_linked)




# Financial Reasons Not Linked to Care

eip_main$financial_not_linked_med_staff[(eip_main$financial_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$financial_linked)) &
                                    (eip_main$ltc_financial_prevented_rsn___1 == 1 |
                                       eip_main$ltc_financial_prevented_rsn___2 == 1 |
                                       eip_main$ltc_financial_prevented_rsn___11 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$financial_not_linked_med_staff)


eip_main$financial_not_linked_family[(eip_main$financial_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$financial_linked)) &
                                 (eip_main$ltc_financial_prevented_rsn___3 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$financial_not_linked_family)


eip_main$financial_not_linked_not_talking[(eip_main$financial_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$financial_linked)) &
                                      (eip_main$ltc_financial_prevented_rsn___4 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$financial_not_linked_not_talking)


eip_main$financial_not_linked_safety[(eip_main$financial_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$financial_linked)) &
                                 (eip_main$ltc_financial_prevented_rsn___5 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$financial_not_linked_safety)


eip_main$financial_not_linked_medical[(eip_main$financial_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$financial_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_financial_prevented_rsn___6 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_financial_prevented_rsn___8)] <- 1
table(eip_main$financial_not_linked_medical)
