```{r, include=FALSE}
eip_main$financial_not_linked_contact[(eip_main$financial_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$financial_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_financial_prevented_rsn___7 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_financial_prevented_rsn___13 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_financial_prevented_rsn___14 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$financial_not_linked_contact)


eip_main$financial_not_linked_contact[(eip_main$financial_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$financial_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_financial_prevented_rsn___7 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_financial_prevented_rsn___13 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_financial_prevented_rsn___14 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$financial_not_linked_contact)


eip_main$financial_not_linked_language[(eip_main$financial_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$financial_linked)) &
                                   (eip_main$ltc_financial_prevented_rsn___9 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$financial_not_linked_language)


eip_main$financial_not_linked_other[(eip_main$financial_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$financial_linked)) &
                                (eip_main$ltc_financial_prevented_rsn___10 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$financial_not_linked_other)




# Abuse Linkage Data

table(eip_main$additional_services___6)
eip_main$abuse_linkage_case[eip_main$additional_services___6 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$abuse_linkage_case)


# Ineligible Abuse Linkage - Already Linked

table(eip_main$ltc_abuse_declined_rsn___23)
eip_main$abuse_already_linked[eip_main$abuse_linkage_case == 1 &
                                    (eip_main$ltc_abuse_declined_rsn___23 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$abuse_already_linked)




# Ineligible Abuse Linkage - Deceased

table(eip_main$ltc_abuse_declined_rsn___35)
table(eip_main$ltc_abuse_prevented_rsn___17)
eip_main$abuse_deceased[eip_main$abuse_linkage_case == 1 &
                              (eip_main$ltc_abuse_declined_rsn___35 == 1 |
                                 eip_main$ltc_abuse_prevented_rsn___17 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$abuse_deceased)




# Ineligible Abuse Linkage - Incarcerated

table(eip_main$ltc_abuse_prevented_rsn___12)
eip_main$abuse_incarcerated[eip_main$abuse_linkage_case == 1 &
                                  eip_main$ltc_abuse_prevented_rsn___12 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$abuse_incarcerated)




# Ineligible Abuse Linkage - Declined Linkage Service

table(eip_main$ltc_abuse_final_ltc_status)
eip_main$abuse_linkage_declined[(eip_main$abuse_linkage_case == 1 &
                                       eip_main$ltc_abuse_final_ltc_status == 2) &
                                      (is.na(eip_main$abuse_already_linked) &
                                         is.na(eip_main$abuse_deceased) &
                                         is.na(eip_main$abuse_incarcerated))] <- 1
table(eip_main$abuse_linkage_declined)




# Abuse Eligibility to be Linked

eip_main$abuse_eligible_linkage[eip_main$abuse_linkage_case == 1 &
                                      (is.na(eip_main$abuse_already_linked) &
                                         is.na(eip_main$abuse_deceased) &
                                         is.na(eip_main$abuse_incarcerated) &
                                         is.na(eip_main$abuse_linkage_declined))] <- 1
table(eip_main$abuse_eligible_linkage)



# Abuse Open/Closed Cases

table(eip_main$ltc_abuse_open_case_calc)
eip_main$abuse_open_case[eip_main$abuse_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                               eip_main$ltc_abuse_open_case_calc == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$abuse_open_case)


table(eip_main$abuse_eligible_linkage, eip_main$abuse_open_case)
eip_main$abuse_closed_case[eip_main$abuse_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                                 is.na(eip_main$abuse_open_case)] <- 1
table(eip_main$abuse_closed_case)




# Abuse Cases Linked to Care

table(eip_main$abuse_closed_case, eip_main$ltc_abuse_final_ltc_status)
eip_main$abuse_linked[eip_main$abuse_closed_case == 1 &
                            eip_main$ltc_abuse_final_ltc_status == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$abuse_linked)




# Abuse Reasons Not Linked to Care

eip_main$abuse_not_linked_med_staff[(eip_main$abuse_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$abuse_linked)) &
                                    (eip_main$ltc_abuse_prevented_rsn___1 == 1 |
                                       eip_main$ltc_abuse_prevented_rsn___2 == 1 |
                                       eip_main$ltc_abuse_prevented_rsn___11 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$abuse_not_linked_med_staff)


eip_main$abuse_not_linked_family[(eip_main$abuse_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$abuse_linked)) &
                                 (eip_main$ltc_abuse_prevented_rsn___3 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$abuse_not_linked_family)


eip_main$abuse_not_linked_not_talking[(eip_main$abuse_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$abuse_linked)) &
                                      (eip_main$ltc_abuse_prevented_rsn___4 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$abuse_not_linked_not_talking)


eip_main$abuse_not_linked_safety[(eip_main$abuse_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$abuse_linked)) &
                                 (eip_main$ltc_abuse_prevented_rsn___5 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$abuse_not_linked_safety)


eip_main$abuse_not_linked_medical[(eip_main$abuse_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$abuse_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_abuse_prevented_rsn___6 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_abuse_prevented_rsn___8)] <- 1
table(eip_main$abuse_not_linked_medical)


eip_main$abuse_not_linked_contact[(eip_main$abuse_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$abuse_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_abuse_prevented_rsn___7 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_abuse_prevented_rsn___13 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_abuse_prevented_rsn___14 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$abuse_not_linked_contact)


eip_main$abuse_not_linked_contact[(eip_main$abuse_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$abuse_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_abuse_prevented_rsn___7 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_abuse_prevented_rsn___13 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_abuse_prevented_rsn___14 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$abuse_not_linked_contact)


eip_main$abuse_not_linked_language[(eip_main$abuse_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$abuse_linked)) &
                                   (eip_main$ltc_abuse_prevented_rsn___9 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$abuse_not_linked_language)


eip_main$abuse_not_linked_other[(eip_main$abuse_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$abuse_linked)) &
                                (eip_main$ltc_abuse_prevented_rsn___10 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$abuse_not_linked_other)




# General Linkage Data

table(eip_main$additional_services___7)
eip_main$general_linkage_case[eip_main$additional_services___7 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$general_linkage_case)


# Ineligible General Linkage - Already Linked

table(eip_main$ltc_general_declined_rsn___23)
eip_main$general_already_linked[eip_main$general_linkage_case == 1 &
                                (eip_main$ltc_general_declined_rsn___23 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$general_already_linked)




# Ineligible General Linkage - Deceased

table(eip_main$ltc_general_declined_rsn___35)
table(eip_main$ltc_general_prevented_rsn___17)
eip_main$general_deceased[eip_main$general_linkage_case == 1 &
                          (eip_main$ltc_general_declined_rsn___35 == 1 |
                             eip_main$ltc_general_prevented_rsn___17 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$general_deceased)




# Ineligible General Linkage - Incarcerated

table(eip_main$ltc_general_prevented_rsn___12)
eip_main$general_incarcerated[eip_main$general_linkage_case == 1 &
                              eip_main$ltc_general_prevented_rsn___12 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$general_incarcerated)




# Ineligible General Linkage - Declined Linkage Service

table(eip_main$ltc_general_final_ltc_status)
eip_main$general_linkage_declined[(eip_main$general_linkage_case == 1 &
                                   eip_main$ltc_general_final_ltc_status == 2) &
                                  (is.na(eip_main$general_already_linked) &
                                     is.na(eip_main$general_deceased) &
                                     is.na(eip_main$general_incarcerated))] <- 1
table(eip_main$general_linkage_declined)




# General Eligibility to be Linked

eip_main$general_eligible_linkage[eip_main$general_linkage_case == 1 &
                                  (is.na(eip_main$general_already_linked) &
                                     is.na(eip_main$general_deceased) &
                                     is.na(eip_main$general_incarcerated) &
                                     is.na(eip_main$general_linkage_declined))] <- 1
table(eip_main$general_eligible_linkage)



# General Open/Closed Cases

table(eip_main$ltc_general_open_case_calc)
eip_main$general_open_case[eip_main$general_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                           eip_main$ltc_general_open_case_calc == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$general_open_case)


table(eip_main$general_eligible_linkage, eip_main$general_open_case)
eip_main$general_closed_case[eip_main$general_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                             is.na(eip_main$general_open_case)] <- 1
table(eip_main$general_closed_case)




# General Cases Linked to Care

table(eip_main$general_closed_case, eip_main$ltc_general_final_ltc_status)
eip_main$general_linked[eip_main$general_closed_case == 1 &
                        eip_main$ltc_general_final_ltc_status == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$general_linked)




# General Reasons Not Linked to Care

eip_main$general_not_linked_med_staff[(eip_main$general_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$general_linked)) &
                                    (eip_main$ltc_general_prevented_rsn___1 == 1 |
                                       eip_main$ltc_general_prevented_rsn___2 == 1 |
                                       eip_main$ltc_general_prevented_rsn___11 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$general_not_linked_med_staff)


eip_main$general_not_linked_family[(eip_main$general_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$general_linked)) &
                                 (eip_main$ltc_general_prevented_rsn___3 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$general_not_linked_family)


eip_main$general_not_linked_not_talking[(eip_main$general_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$general_linked)) &
                                      (eip_main$ltc_general_prevented_rsn___4 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$general_not_linked_not_talking)


eip_main$general_not_linked_safety[(eip_main$general_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$general_linked)) &
                                 (eip_main$ltc_general_prevented_rsn___5 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$general_not_linked_safety)


eip_main$general_not_linked_medical[(eip_main$general_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$general_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_general_prevented_rsn___6 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_general_prevented_rsn___8)] <- 1
table(eip_main$general_not_linked_medical)


eip_main$general_not_linked_contact[(eip_main$general_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$general_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_general_prevented_rsn___7 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_general_prevented_rsn___13 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_general_prevented_rsn___14 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$general_not_linked_contact)


eip_main$general_not_linked_contact[(eip_main$general_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$general_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_general_prevented_rsn___7 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_general_prevented_rsn___13 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_general_prevented_rsn___14 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$general_not_linked_contact)


eip_main$general_not_linked_language[(eip_main$general_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$general_linked)) &
                                   (eip_main$ltc_general_prevented_rsn___9 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$general_not_linked_language)


eip_main$general_not_linked_other[(eip_main$general_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$general_linked)) &
                                (eip_main$ltc_general_prevented_rsn___10 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$general_not_linked_other)




# STI Linkage Data

table(eip_main$additional_services___8)
eip_main$sti_linkage_case[eip_main$additional_services___8 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$sti_linkage_case)


# Ineligible STI Linkage - Already Linked

table(eip_main$ltc_sti_declined_rsn___23)
eip_main$sti_already_linked[eip_main$sti_linkage_case == 1 &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_sti_declined_rsn___23 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$sti_already_linked)




# Ineligible STI Linkage - Deceased

table(eip_main$ltc_sti_declined_rsn___35)
table(eip_main$ltc_sti_prevented_rsn___17)
eip_main$sti_deceased[eip_main$sti_linkage_case == 1 &
                            (eip_main$ltc_sti_declined_rsn___35 == 1 |
                               eip_main$ltc_sti_prevented_rsn___17 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$sti_deceased)




# Ineligible STI Linkage - Incarcerated

table(eip_main$ltc_sti_prevented_rsn___12)
eip_main$sti_incarcerated[eip_main$sti_linkage_case == 1 &
                                eip_main$ltc_sti_prevented_rsn___12 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$sti_incarcerated)




# Ineligible STI Linkage - Declined Linkage Service

table(eip_main$ltc_sti_final_ltc_status)
eip_main$sti_linkage_declined[(eip_main$sti_linkage_case == 1 &
                                     eip_main$ltc_sti_final_ltc_status == 2) &
                                    (is.na(eip_main$sti_already_linked) &
                                       is.na(eip_main$sti_deceased) &
                                       is.na(eip_main$sti_incarcerated))] <- 1
table(eip_main$sti_linkage_declined)




# STI Eligibility to be Linked

eip_main$sti_eligible_linkage[eip_main$sti_linkage_case == 1 &
                                    (is.na(eip_main$sti_already_linked) &
                                       is.na(eip_main$sti_deceased) &
                                       is.na(eip_main$sti_incarcerated) &
                                       is.na(eip_main$sti_linkage_declined))] <- 1
table(eip_main$sti_eligible_linkage)



# STI Open/Closed Cases

table(eip_main$ltc_sti_open_case_calc)
eip_main$sti_open_case[eip_main$sti_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                             eip_main$ltc_sti_open_case_calc == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$sti_open_case)


table(eip_main$sti_eligible_linkage, eip_main$sti_open_case)
eip_main$sti_closed_case[eip_main$sti_eligible_linkage == 1 &
                               is.na(eip_main$sti_open_case)] <- 1
table(eip_main$sti_closed_case)




# STI Cases Linked to Care

table(eip_main$sti_closed_case, eip_main$ltc_sti_final_ltc_status)
eip_main$sti_linked[eip_main$sti_closed_case == 1 &
                          eip_main$ltc_sti_final_ltc_status == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$sti_linked)




# STI Reasons Not Linked to Care

eip_main$sti_not_linked_med_staff[(eip_main$sti_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$sti_linked)) &
                                    (eip_main$ltc_sti_prevented_rsn___1 == 1 |
                                       eip_main$ltc_sti_prevented_rsn___2 == 1 |
                                       eip_main$ltc_sti_prevented_rsn___11 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$sti_not_linked_med_staff)


eip_main$sti_not_linked_family[(eip_main$sti_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$sti_linked)) &
                                 (eip_main$ltc_sti_prevented_rsn___3 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$sti_not_linked_family)


eip_main$sti_not_linked_not_talking[(eip_main$sti_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$sti_linked)) &
                                      (eip_main$ltc_sti_prevented_rsn___4 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$sti_not_linked_not_talking)


eip_main$sti_not_linked_safety[(eip_main$sti_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$sti_linked)) &
                                 (eip_main$ltc_sti_prevented_rsn___5 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$sti_not_linked_safety)


eip_main$sti_not_linked_medical[(eip_main$sti_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$sti_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_sti_prevented_rsn___6 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_sti_prevented_rsn___8)] <- 1
table(eip_main$sti_not_linked_medical)


eip_main$sti_not_linked_contact[(eip_main$sti_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$sti_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_sti_prevented_rsn___7 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_sti_prevented_rsn___13 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_sti_prevented_rsn___14 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$sti_not_linked_contact)


eip_main$sti_not_linked_contact[(eip_main$sti_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$sti_linked)) &
                                  (eip_main$ltc_sti_prevented_rsn___7 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_sti_prevented_rsn___13 == 1 |
                                     eip_main$ltc_sti_prevented_rsn___14 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$sti_not_linked_contact)


eip_main$sti_not_linked_language[(eip_main$sti_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$sti_linked)) &
                                   (eip_main$ltc_sti_prevented_rsn___9 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$sti_not_linked_language)


eip_main$sti_not_linked_other[(eip_main$sti_closed_case == 1 & is.na(eip_main$sti_linked)) &
                                (eip_main$ltc_sti_prevented_rsn___10 == 1)] <- 1
table(eip_main$sti_not_linked_other)




# Linkage Cases open more than 3 months

eip_main$ltc_case_length <- difftime(Sys.Date(), eip_main$Date, units = "days")
table(eip_main$ltc_case_length)
table(eip_main$ltc_open_case_calc)
eip_main$ltc_case_length[is.na(eip_main$ltc_open_case_calc)] <- ''
table(eip_main$ltc_case_length)

eip_main$ltc_over90days[eip_main$ltc_open_case_calc == 1 & eip_main$ltc_case_length > 90] <- 1
table(eip_main$ltc_over90days)




# Referrals

eip_main$hpa_resources_hiv[eip_main$referral_hiv_checklist___3 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hpa_resources_hiv)

eip_main$hpa_referral_hiv[eip_main$referral_hiv_checklist___1 == 1 |
                            eip_main$referral_hiv_checklist___2 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hpa_referral_hiv)


eip_main$hpa_resources_hcv[eip_main$referral_hcv_checklist___3 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hpa_resources_hcv)

eip_main$hpa_referral_hcv[eip_main$referral_hcv_checklist___1 == 1 |
                            eip_main$referral_hcv_checklist___2 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hpa_referral_hcv)


eip_main$hpa_resources_sud[eip_main$referral_sud_checklist___3 == 1 |
                             eip_main$referral_peer_checklist___3] <- 1
table(eip_main$hpa_resources_sud)

eip_main$hpa_referral_sud[eip_main$peer_navigator == 1 |
                            eip_main$referral_sud_checklist___1 == 1 |
                            eip_main$referral_sud_checklist___2 == 1 |
                            eip_main$referral_peer_checklist___1 == 1 |
                            eip_main$referral_peer_checklist___2 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hpa_referral_sud)


eip_main$hpa_resources_mh[eip_main$referral_mh_checklist___3 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hpa_resources_mh)

eip_main$hpa_referral_mh[eip_main$referral_mh_checklist___1 == 1 |
                            eip_main$referral_mh_checklist___2 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hpa_referral_mh)


eip_main$hpa_resources_prep[eip_main$referral_prep_checklist___3 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hpa_resources_prep)

eip_main$hpa_referral_prep[eip_main$prep_referral == 1 |
                             eip_main$referral_prep_checklist___1 == 1 |
                            eip_main$referral_prep_checklist___2 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hpa_referral_prep)


eip_main$hpa_resources_sti[eip_main$referral_sti_checklist___3 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hpa_resources_sti)

eip_main$hpa_referral_sti[eip_main$referral_sti_checklist___1 == 1 |
                            eip_main$referral_sti_checklist___2 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hpa_referral_sti)


eip_main$hpa_resources_housing[eip_main$referral_housing_checklist___3 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hpa_resources_housing)

eip_main$hpa_referral_housing[eip_main$referral_housing_checklist___1 == 1 |
                            eip_main$referral_housing_checklist___2 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hpa_referral_housing)


eip_main$hpa_resources_ht[eip_main$referral_ht_checklist___3 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hpa_resources_ht)

eip_main$hpa_referral_ht[eip_main$referral_ht_checklist___1 == 1 |
                            eip_main$referral_ht_checklist___2 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hpa_referral_ht)


eip_main$hpa_resources_abuse[eip_main$referral_personabuse_checklist___3 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hpa_resources_abuse)

eip_main$hpa_referral_abuse[eip_main$referral_personabuse_checklist___1 == 1 |
                            eip_main$referral_personabuse_checklist___2 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hpa_referral_abuse)


eip_main$hpa_resources_general[eip_main$referral_general_checklist___3 == 1 |
                                 eip_main$referral_pcp_checklist___3 == 1 |
                                 eip_main$referral_ed_sw_checklist___3 == 1 |
                                 eip_main$referral_other_checklist___3 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hpa_resources_general)

eip_main$hpa_referral_general[eip_main$referral_general_checklist___1 == 1 |
                                eip_main$referral_general_checklist___2 == 1 |
                                eip_main$referral_pcp_checklist___1 == 1 |
                                eip_main$referral_pcp_checklist___2 == 1 |
                                eip_main$referral_ed_sw_checklist___1 == 1 |
                                eip_main$referral_ed_sw_checklist___2 == 1 |
                                eip_main$referral_other_checklist___1 == 1 |
                                eip_main$referral_other_checklist___2 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hpa_referral_general)


eip_main$hpa_resources_food[eip_main$referral_food_checklist___3 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hpa_resources_food)

eip_main$hpa_referral_food[eip_main$referral_food_checklist___1 == 1 |
                            eip_main$referral_food_checklist___2 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hpa_referral_food)


eip_main$hpa_resources_financial[eip_main$referral_financial_checklist___3 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hpa_resources_financial)

eip_main$hpa_referral_financial[eip_main$referral_financial_checklist___1 == 1 |
                            eip_main$referral_financial_checklist___2 == 1] <- 1
table(eip_main$hpa_referral_financial)




##########################################################################################
###########################  Finalizing Encounter File  ##################################
##########################################################################################

head(eip_main)
main <- select(eip_main, record_id, Date, Location, Encounter, Assessed, AssessedBy, DeclinedAssessment,
              PreventedAssessment, sud_assessed, SUDpositive, Marijuana, Cocaine, Amphetamines, Methamphetamines, Inhalants,
              Sedatives, Hallucinogens, StreetOpioids, PrescriptionOpioids, Opioids, mh_assessed, MHpositive,
              Depression, Anxiety, PTSD, prep_eligible_assessed, PrEPeligible, prep_assessed, SexWork,
              MultiPartners, PWID, STIpastyr, MSM, HRHS, HIVtest, incomplete_hiv_result, false_positive,
              DeclineHIVtest, PreventHIVtest, CTRtest, EHEtest, CTRtestpos, NewCTRpos, EHEtestpos, NewEHEpos,
              HIVtestresult, AcuteHIV, TestedBy, HIVstatus, PLWHAassessed, HIVlinked, WOC, Youth, MSM, IDU,
              Hetero, HRHS, MSM_IDU_CTRtested, MSM_Youth_CTRtested, MSM_IDU_EHEtested, MSM_Youth_EHEtested,
              MSM_NewCTR_HIV_Dx, MSM_CTRassessed, MSM_EHEassessed, MSM_CTRtested, MSM_EHEtested,
              HRHS_IDU_CTRtested, HRHS_Youth_CTRtested, HRHS_WOC_CTRtested, HRHS_NewCTR_HIV_Dx,
              HRHS_CTRassessed, HRHS_EHEassessed, HRHS_CTRtested, HRHS_EHEtested,
              fts_offered_link, fts_accepted_link, fts_offered_assess, fts_accepted_assess,
              qrt_approached, qrt_consent, qrt_declined, qrt_prevented, PLWHA_WOCassessed,
              PLWHA_Youthassessed, PLWHA_IDUassessed, NewCTRpos_MSM, NewCTRpos_HRHS, 
              hiv_linkage_case, hiv_already_linked, hiv_deceased, hiv_incarcerated,
              hiv_linkage_declined, hiv_eligible_linkage, hiv_new_eligible_linkage,
              hiv_prev_eligible_linkage, hiv_unk_eligible_linkage, hiv_open_case, hiv_new_open_case,
              hiv_prev_open_case, hiv_unk_open_case, hiv_closed_case, hiv_linked, hiv_new_linked,
              hiv_prev_linked, hiv_unk_linked, ht_assessed, ht_assessed_pulvino, ht_pos_pulvino,
              unsafe_work_yes, unsafe_work_no, unsafe_work_not_asked, unsafe_work_declined,
              unsafe_work_assessed, forced_work_yes, forced_work_no, forced_work_not_asked,
              forced_work_declined, forced_work_assessed, fear_leave_work_yes, fear_leave_work_no,
              fear_leave_work_not_asked, fear_leave_work_declined, fear_leave_work_assessed,

              hpa_referral_financial)
head(main)

head(main)
dim(main)

```

# CTR Testing 

The Counseling, Testing, and Referral to treatment (CTR) testing program...

# EHE Testing

The Ending the HIV Epidemic (EHE) testing program...

# NACHO Testing

Spot holder for NACHO definition and data.
